highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai ranks #25 under the category 'Dental'.

The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: I have secured a rank of 100 in NEET MDS. Can I get a seat at Government Dental College and Hospital, Mumbai? I belong to General category.
faqs.answer:
Government Dental College and Hospital, Mumbai accepts NEET MDS scores for admission to the MDS courses. As per the 2024 MDS cutoff, the Seat Allotment Result was released for the last round, wherein the closing ranks ranged between 44 and 497 for the General AI category students. So considering the last round cutoffs, candidates with a cutoff rank of 100 are eligible to get admission at GDC Hospital, Mumbai if you are belonging to the General category. Mentioned below is the NEET MDS last round cutoff to check what are the courses available with a cutoff rank up to 100 at Government Dental College and Hospital, Mumbai:
Course 2024
MDS in Prosthodontics 44
MDS in Orthodontics 91

faqs.question: Is Government Dental College And Hospital, Mumbai a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Government Dental College And Hospital, Mumbai is a well-known institution for BDS, MDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Government Dental College And Hospital, Mumbai has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 4.1 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

placements.overview:
Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai is a public institute. Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai is approved by DCI and offers a total of 11 courses at UG and PG levels in 6 specialisations such as Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Oral Medicine & Radiology, Oral Pathology , Orthodontics and Periodontology. Furthermore, it offer courses such as BDS and MDS in Full Time mode. Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 3,02,400 to 3,25,500. Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai has an annual seat intake of 164 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. As per the recent Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 11,18,182. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Candidates can check the NEET MDS closing ranks (CRs) on this page and on MCC official website. Tabulated below are the NEET MDS Stray Vacancy Round closing ranks for Government Dental College Mumbai cutoff 2022, for the Open category (All India Quota) students :

Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as BDS. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MDS. Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai courses stands around INR 3,02,400 to 3,25,500.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with faculty members of this college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, around 95% is required in NEET for admission. Admission takes place through NEET counseling. Courses offered are BDS, diploma in dental mechanics, MS in oral surgery, prosthodontics, orthodontics, periodontics, oral medicine diagnosis & radiology, oral pathology, pedodontics, and endodontics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is small. Hostel rooms are very good. The library is air-conditioned. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. All medical facilities are available for free at St. George's Hospital. Playground is available for sports like volleyball. There are 3 canteens in this college. The food quality is very good at affordable prices. Our college has high patient exposure.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend students to join this college.

review_content.Placements: Our college was good for both under graduation and post-graduation. Internships were great at this college. The patient flow was around 250.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library was very good. Air-conditioners were available. Hostel facilities were better. The food served in the canteen was good. Our classrooms were well-maintained. Sports were conducted in our college. We can play basketball and table tennis.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers were very good. They always help us with our doubts. Semester exams were moderate, and the pass percentage was 50%. Our teachers were helpful, and we can learn all the basics of dentistry like RCT and extraction.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Maharashtra for dentistry.

review_content.Placements: I am an intern at Government Dental College And Hospital, Mumbai. Admissions to this college completely occur based on NEET UG exam score and their rank. Around 125 new students take admission every year. Interns get an Rs 11,000 stipend every month for 1 year. It is 5 years course which includes 4 years of academics, and a 1-year internship is compulsory.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has 4-5 floor buildings with good infrastructure. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained. There are 8-9 departments in this college. It also provides a library which remains open from 8.00 AM to 10.00 PM. There is no mess system for hostelers, but two canteens are available i.e one is in the hostel, and another one is in the hospital which provides good quality food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Dentistry earns lot of money with respect to doctors but only after good practice.

review_content.Placements: All my colleagues and seniors of our college with good practical knowledge have excellent earnings. If you understand the basic funds and things in your clinic, then u do good practice and earn well. In our batch, out of 150 students, 95 students passed out in the first attempt. Many of my colleagues started private clinics immediately after the internship completion and made average earnings initially but now, after 3-4 years they earn well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library in the ground floor has lots of important books available which is open at college time of 9 am to 5 pm. You need a library card to get book from the library temporarily and then return it. There are about 5000 books related to dental. There is peaceful environment in library for reading. There is a seperate reading room available with a chair and table. There is free Wi-Fi for staff and students. There is a huge garden on campus with trees for chilling after hospital closure. Problem in hostel is cleanliness. There is garbage all around.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college for opting for a dental course.

review_content.Placements: The college offers a bachelor degree in dental and also a master in various fields of dentistry. There is no recruiting system as it is a medical college. Students have to find on their own in future to excel in life. As it a medical college, the students have to go through a one-year internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, but there is a slight shortage currently going with the materials for studying as it is a government-funded college. The mess is good, and the hostel is the best and has a great value for money. Classrooms, laboratories and the library are good, and our college has a separate gym for boys and girls. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This college is awesome because of its good faculty and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In our college, one must complete the 4 years of their course and 1-year internship. The average stipend offered was Rs. 6,000-8,000. Even after completing your internship, you can do housestaffship in the same college. Since this is the best dental college in India, you get jobs very easily.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite impressive. All the lecture theatres are air-conditioned. We have different labs for each subject. All the equipment is available for practicals. There is an auditorium in which all the activities and events are organised. The library contains separate seats for everyone. A sports event named Dental Premiere League is organised every year. Other sports events are also organised here. We also have a separate gym for boys and girls in the hostel.

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Maharashtra In 2025

nirf.description:
Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Dental' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Government Dental College And Hospital,Mumbai climbed 4 ranks to #21 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

Details regarding each stage of the admission procedure are explained in the following sections.
1: Application Process

Candidates interested in getting admission into Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad must complete the online application process for the desired course. Eligible students can apply by visiting its official website (amrita.edu). The application procedure involves online registration, form filling, document upload, and application fee payment.
2: Selection Criteria

After the application process, candidates have to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, course-wise selection lists can be released by the institute on its official website (with the names of the shortlisted students).
3: Admission Confirmation

Candidates who make it to the selection list can report to the institute to confirm their seat. Some amount of Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad fee may have to be paid for admission confirmation.

college_info.college_name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad Campus Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad under Amrita University offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. The eligible students are awarded Amrita Chancellor’s Scholarships which are offered to students according to their marks and admission interview performance. The below-mentioned is the criterion for Amrita scholarships:
Note: The above-mentioned scholarships are applicable for UG, PG, PhD programmes. These scholarships are not applicable to programmes in the fields of Pharmacy, Nursing, and Allied Health Sciences.
The following clauses are communicated to students during the scholarship admission:

Amrita scholarships are awarded on a one-time renewable basis, for any single programme in an academic year. The scholarship is valid for a period of one year and is renewable each and every year based on the student’s academic performance and also conduct

Scholarships commonly are tuition fee waivers only, and the amount of this waiver is based on the type of scholarship that is awarded to students. This is strictly non-negotiable and cannot be extended to any other fees categories or substituted in cash
No student is eligible to have more than one scholarship at a time, irrespective of the amount or type of scholarship and/or study support donations

The Scholarship Committee must set the evaluation criterion for cessation or renewal of the scholarship with applicable renewal conditions. The validity of the scholarship duration is based on the students' satisfactory academic performance in each and every semester / trimester, regular class attendance as well as good standards of behavior throughout the duration of programme

The scholarships are awarded with the support of the academic transcripts that have been submitted by various students as part of the eligibility fulfillment. Discrepancy in any of the supporting or submitted documents will result in immediate withdrawal of the scholarship and/or the admission

The students must submit the AIU (Association of Indian Universities) equivalence certificate for the last foreign academic qualification and/or various academic transcripts to complete the eligibility criterion. Non-compliance in the submission of the AIU certificate can also lead to withdrawal of the scholarship
Download the Amrita Scholarships Brochure

There are various other Student Financial Aid and Scholarships awarded to students. These scholarships are based on merit, economic need, equal opportunity, and also affirmative actions for socially backward groups. The scholarship policy does not discriminate against students or even scholars based on gender preference, gender, caste, age, faith, or even disability. Below is the summary of the criteria that play a crucial role in making the scholarship decisions:

Top students in any of the schools are eligible for this scholarship consideration. To avail of and become eligible for the merit scholarship benefit, students must provide proof of academic and scholarly accomplishments.  The percentile of students receiving this scholarship depends upon the school and area of specialisation.

The university is greatly committed to affirmative actions for such backward groups such as SC/ST, OBC, and other such groups that are approved by the Government of India. A certain percentage of such groups will always be receiving the scholarships each year.
The Special Disadvantaged groups include women, those with disabilities, and others. These groups are not treated with any discrimination and are afforded an equal opportunity for scholarship.
Scholarship Application Process

The students must contact the departmental office and submit the complete application form. The department will provide various students with a list of several scholarship schemes available for them. The students are responsible for submitting all the necessary documentation based on these schemes. Such documentation includes proof of merit, government-approved proofs for members of Backward communities, recommendation letters for merit scholarships, and any other necessary documentation for special disadvantaged groups.
Download the Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad Scholarships Brochure

college_info.intro:
Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Kakinada have several departments, like the Department of Chemical Engineering, Mathematics, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc. Through these departments, JNTUK offers various UG, PG, and PhD courses.
Popular programmes at JNTU Kakinada are, BTech and MTech. The institute offers a 4-year BTech programme and a 2-year MTech programme in various specialisations. The popularity of these programmes is due to their curriculum, which is constantly upgraded to suit various branches of engineering and technology.
The industry-institute relations established by JNTU Kakinada provide students with ample opportunities to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. reviews_list.review_title: Genuine review of GIET college.

review_content.Placements: My batch is from 2021 to 2025. Overall, classes were going well, but placements were low when compared to other universities. Academics were good, but the fee was very high, and the security of the college was very strict. The lowest package was 3 LPA, and the highest was 6 LPA, even though skilled persons remain jobless.
review_content.Infrastructure: Cultural activities were good in the college. When it comes to the hostel, the food was average, and the infrastructure was good. The classrooms, library, and canteen were very near the blocks and good. They allow sports in cultural activities only, but not for the leisure period in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.

review_content.Placements: In GVPCE, nearly 60-70% of students are placed in our course, and the higher package in mechanical engineering is around 12 LPA, the average is 4-6 LPA, and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. The top roles offered are product manager, design engineer, and nearly 80% of students get internship offers from companies likes Renolt, Hyundai, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

overview_faqs.question: Is JNTU Kakinada good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers two years MBA course offered in a ful-time mode. The programme costs between INR 54,000 and INR 3 lakh. The placements at JNTU Kakinada for MBA programme are decnt. The average salary package offered during JNTU Kakinada MBA placements 2022 stood at INR 5.02 LPA. Further, the university also been accredited by NAAC with a Grade of 'A+' and approved by AICTE & UGC. JNTU Kakinada has received 151 Rank in the Overall Category by the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) 2023. Overall JNTUK is a good university for candidates wants to pursue MBA in a low cost.

review_summary.college_name: JNTUK Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: You get placements if you are a topper.

content.Placements: We have many companies collaborating with our college like IBM and KMPH. We get many companies and MNCs, multinational companies like Saint Goblin and many others. We also have internships with normal funds provided. As per me, I participate in many hackathons conducted by our college.
content.Infrastructure: We have nice infrastructure and clean roads with nice greenery. We also have large grounds with indoor and outdoor basketball courts. There is a bus facility. Our college is around 300 acres approximately. We also have 2 main libraries and many small libraries, also with chemical and mechanical labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Okay, it is good and not too bad.

content.Placements: 35 percent of students are placed in my course and the highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package will be 1.5 LPA. Average package will be 2 LPA to 3 LPA are offered in my course and the top recruiting companies are Tesla, Google, Microsoft, VVDN. 30 percent of students got internship from my course in Tesla and VVDN companies and the top roles will be HR manager only.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good and there is no Wi-Fi in college. Classrooms are clean and good and the library is covered with AC, it is good, and stock is updated daily, it is very good. The facilities in hostel are not good because it is not clean, and food also not tasty in mess, but canteen food is good and sports and games are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Genuine review of GIET college.

content.Placements: My batch is from 2021 to 2025. Overall, classes were going well, but placements were low when compared to other universities. Academics were good, but the fee was very high, and the security of the college was very strict. The lowest package was 3 LPA, and the highest was 6 LPA, even though skilled persons remain jobless.
content.Infrastructure: Cultural activities were good in the college. When it comes to the hostel, the food was average, and the infrastructure was good. The classrooms, library, and canteen were very near the blocks and good. They allow sports in cultural activities only, but not for the leisure period in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.

content.Placements: In GVPCE, nearly 60-70% of students are placed in our course, and the higher package in mechanical engineering is around 12 LPA, the average is 4-6 LPA, and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. The top roles offered are product manager, design engineer, and nearly 80% of students get internship offers from companies likes Renolt, Hyundai, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.

content.Placements: 60% of students were placed in our course. 10 LPA is the highest, 1 LPA is the lowest, and 5 LPA is the average package offered in our course. TCS, Wipro, and Cognizant are the top recruiting companies for our course. 30% of students got internships from our course in Renault, Hyundai, TCS, and Wipro companies. System engineering, AutoCAD designer, and technology analyst are the roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

admission_overview.description: JNTU Kakinada admission 2025 will open soon. The admissions are based on national-level entrance tests or merit basis. JNTUK offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral-level programmes, such as BTech, BPharma, BArch, PharmD, MTech, MPharma, MCA, MBA, MAM, and PhD under various disciplines. Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers UG and PG courses via its schools and affiliated colleges/ campus. The university mainly accepts EAMCET (Engg, Agriculture & Medical Common Entrance Test) for admission. However, national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, AP PGECET, etc., for admission to its UG and PG courses.

admission_process.title: JNTUK Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JNTUK application process involves shortlisting of students, the release of merit list, counselling, and seat allotment. Find out more on JNTUK admission below:1 - Application ProcessJNTUH admissions require students to visit the official website of the respective national-level entrance exam conducting bodies. They need to fill out the application form in online mode.
For the remaining programme candidates are required to apply directly from the official website of JNTUK.
2 - Shortlisting of Students & Release of Merit List

JNTUK shortlists candidates based on entrance exam performance. These include TS EAMCET, GATE, GPAT, etc. The state-level exam conducting bodies, such as TS ICET, release course-wise merit lists for MBA and MCA courses. The university releases a merit list for courses based on merit or national-level exams.
3 - Counselling

Once the merit list is released, eligible students are invited for counselling rounds. For MBA and MCA courses, the counselling is conducted by the TS ICET Counseling. For BTech admission, the TS EAMCET Counseling is held. And for MTech PGECET counseling is required.
4 - Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation
As per the round of counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible students. Further, the selected students can confirm their admission by paying the course fees.

JNTUK fee is broken down into multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, and one-time fee. The components in the total fee vary with the course selected by the students. However, the overall tuition fee for JNTUK ranges between INR 25 Kand INR 10 L. Find below JNTUK fees for top courses:

TNTUK offers a limited number of seats for its UG and PG programmes. Programme seats are also offered vis the university's affiliated colleges/campuses. Canddiates must pay the admission fee to finalise the course seats at JNTUK:

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada?
faqs.answer: The JNTUK MBA tuition fees range between INR 54,000 and INR 3 lakh . Students can check the table below to know detailed fee: Fee components Amount (for 2 years) Tuition INR 54,000- 2.57 L Hostel INR 1.08 L - 1.9 L One-time Payment INR 15,000 Total fee INR 1.77 L - 4.62 L

faqs.question: What is the fee structure of JNTUH?
faqs.answer: For the MBA course, the total course fee at JNTUH ranges between INR 54,000 and INR 3 Lacs. For B.Tech and M.Tech courses, the course fee ranges between INR 30,000 and INR 4.15 Lacs and INR 56,000 - INR 2.28 Lacs, respectively. Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral-level programmes for students such as B.Tech, B.Pharma B.Arch Pharma. D M.Tech, M.Pharma MCA MBA, MAM, and Ph.D. under various disciplines. The admissions are based on national-level entrance tests or merit basis.

faqs.question: What is the NATA application fee for 2025 admission to JNTUK BArch?
faqs.answer: After completing the application submission process, candidates will have to make the payment of the prescribed NATA application fee for enrollment in BArch course at JNTUK. The application fee can be paid using Netbanking / Credit Cards / ICICI Isure Bank Challan. Particulars Fee of one test Fee for two tests Fee for three tests General/OBC Male Candidates INR 1,750 INR 3,250 INR 4,500 General/OBC Female Candidates INR 1,250 INR 2,250 INR 3,000 SC/ST/EWS/PwD Male Candidates INR 1,250 INR 2,250 INR 3,000 SC/ST/EWS/PwD Female Candidates INR 1,000 INR 1,750 INR 2,500 Transgender Candidates INR 1,000 INR 1,500 INR 2,000 Outside India INR 10,000 INR 18,000 INR 25,000 Note: Candidates need to download the prefilled registration form and procure the necessary registration documents. They would also be required to select a test centre from the official website at a location convenient to the candidate. Approach the test centre for an appointment for NATA. After this, procure the receipt cum appointment voucher from the test centre and take the exam on the scheduled date.

description: JNTUK cutoff 2025 is available for admission to B.E. / B.Tech via the AP EAMCET exams. Students can scroll down this page to view the cutoff of various accepted exams for different courses, rounds and categories. A few more updates can be seen in the pointers below:

JNTUK AP EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all rounds and categories under both the All India and Home State quota. For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff range in the last round was 485 to 22520, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

JNTUK B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. As per the last round of AP EAMCET, the hardest course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech for the General AI category, which had the cutoff of 485.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories and quotas.

Students who want admission to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada for courses offered via AP EAMCET examination can see the table below to know the important dates for enrolment. Candidates can also download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.

The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) conducts the AP EAMCET exam for admission to BTech, BPharm, and BSc in Agriculture, Bachelor's in Fisheries, and Bachelor's in Horticulture programmes. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the round-wise cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023.

The table below compares different colleges, including JNTUK, based on the last round cutoff ranks of the AP EAMCET exam. The table below compares the General AI category candidates. To view the cutoff for other categories and quotas, use the filters below.

JNTUK accepts TS EAMCET scores for admission to BTech courses through its affiliated institutes. However, the admissions has been over now and the round-wise seat allotment is concluded at a Round 1 seat allotment. As per the JNTUK BTech cutoff 2024, the cutoff ranged between 33538 and 68881. Wherein, the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering stood as the most demanded course among all the courses. Similarly, the least demanded course was B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering.
For the General AI category, the last round closing cutoff for MBA in 2025 was 23.
Students can refer to the table below for the AP ICET Cutoff 2025, as well as for the cutoff for the previous two years, i.e., 2024 and 2023 rounds, categories, quotas, and gender-wise.

highlights.description: JNTUK has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #101-150 in the University category, #101-150 under Engineering, and #51-100 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around JNTUK rankings:

rankings.highlight: 6th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Andhra Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
JNTUK has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for JNTUK indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JNTUK's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by GIET Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: You get placements if you are a topper.
reviews.review_text: We have nice infrastructure and clean roads with nice greenery. We also have large grounds with indoor and outdoor basketball courts. There is a bus facility. Our college is around 300 acres approximately. We also have 2 main libraries and many small libraries, also with chemical and mechanical labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GIET Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Okay, it is good and not too bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good and there is no Wi-Fi in college. Classrooms are clean and good and the library is covered with AC, it is good, and stock is updated daily, it is very good. The facilities in hostel are not good because it is not clean, and food also not tasty in mess, but canteen food is good and sports and games are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Godavari Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of GIET college.
reviews.review_text: Cultural activities were good in the college. When it comes to the hostel, the food was average, and the infrastructure was good. The classrooms, library, and canteen were very near the blocks and good. They allow sports in cultural activities only, but not for the leisure period in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sasi Institute of Technology and EngineeringReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is nice but average placements, good infrastructure, but no fests.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi and labs. The classroom was nice, the hostel was also nice, but the food was average, and the quality was also average. The medical facility is also nice, sports and games are also nice, but need to be improved. NCC and NSS were excellent, but activities were fewer when compared to other colleges. Finally, the college was nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with their friendly nature, but we weren't satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, but not excellent. The lab and library facilities are also available. Our faculty can support us in explaining content coming to the hostel, it is best, but we need to adjust with dinner, and apart from that, everything is good maintenance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The opportunities provided by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering are one of the best things. The labs in our college are well maintained with the best machines and equipment. The college has Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are well maintained, and each class has a separate projector. The infrastructure of GVPCE is quite better compared with other colleges. They provide quality food in the college canteen and hostel mess. We can get unlimited food at the college hostel for only 50 rupees per plate....

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Raghu Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good along with learning environment and average package.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good with pure drinking water and cleaned washrooms, along with AC, central library, and classrooms cleaned every day. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college for free, and lab equipment is there. The hostel is very clean, but the problem is high fees for hostel stay. Food is very tasty, and every day in the evening and morning sports and games are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Not excellent but one of the best. Satisfied with faculty. Dissatisfied with classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in labs is good, and there is always a person who solves any problem that arises in the computers (lab technician available all the time). Classrooms are non-AC, but labs are AC. Canteen is available from early morning to evening 5 PM. Main library is very good and the best place. There is a central library at the starting point of the college, and there are department libraries in each department building. College faculty and management are very supportive towards sports and games, yoga s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Vishnu Engineering College for WomenReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college if you can use the resources well and are dedicated.
reviews.review_text: The labs, classrooms, and library are excellent and top-rated. They give first priority to hygiene. Every part of the campus is very neat and clean. The hostel rooms are also very neat; they clean them regularly and maintain proper hygiene. Medical facilities are also available all the time. Separate facilities for games like carrom, basketball, and cricket are also provided within the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Aditya UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It's absolutely a perfect place filled with different religions and different countries.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are hygienic, and the food is also good. They maintain the hostel room good and clean everyday. The infrastructure is awesome, all the classrooms are equipped with smartboards and Wi-Fi facility and all the floors have separate restrooms for both genders, and playgrounds are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Placements of 2026 for Aditya.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very organized and fully equipped with Wi-Fi facilities. The library is fully organized and has fully updated books with Wi-Fi facilities and computers. There is a reference room where we can take our interviews with high-speed Wi-Fi.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Raghu Engineering CollegeReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Better placements are required.
reviews.review_text: I am a day-scholar, as my friends who were in a college hostel in the 1st year have shared their experience with me, saying that they have 2 outings monthly. Especially the girls should return to the hostel by 9:00 PM, as our college is located on the highway, it is not safe for anyone to roam around, as vehicles pass by day and night. The area is also not so good at night, it is peaceful, but you need to be careful. They provide non-vegetarian food weekly, thrice, and chicken on Sunday. Coming ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best out of all colleges for placements.
reviews.review_text: The college is surrounded by greenery and spacious blocks with well-educated and trained faculty. We have so many labs with an AC facility, and the library is full of updated books and Wi-Fi facilities. In the library, we have reference rooms where we can take interviews, no one can enter the room.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Narayana Medical College and Hospital:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Narayana Medical College and Hospital offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBBS. Whereas, at PG level, Narayana Medical College and Hospital offers courses such as MD, MS and PG Diploma. Narayana Medical College and Hospital fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,83,600 to 56,25,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Narayana Medical College and Hospital is approximately INR 183600 - INR 5625000.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good average food to survive that's enough. And overall good college with enough facilities.

review_content.Placements: Duty medical officer is the post offered most commonly is the post offered to immediate MBBS pass outs. Packages around 50k to 40k are offered. Study rooms are also available. And duty timings are not much hectic. And 10% of people prefer to join the same hospital after studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hygiene maintained well. Good hostel facilities its just that the timings of girls hostel alone are strict good greenery around. And good ambience, ATM facility and play grounds are all available and tournaments of university and freshers day are all held.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good for medical field courses.

review_content.Placements: In our college, internship is provided in self located hospital. Students are placed in multi speciality hospitals for training and for jobs. Top roles offered in our college is cardiology training for students in final year and also in house surgeon training.
review_content.Infrastructure: Medical labs are provided with multi specialty equipment. Classrooms are provided with air conditioners and library is well stocked with books. Canteen food is very hygiene as it also serves for patients and families in hospital. Medical facilities are provided all over the campus in each block separately. Hostel food is very neat and hygiene.

overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Narayana Medical College and Hospital is approximately INR 183600 - INR 5625000.

overview_faqs.question: Is Narayana Medical College and Hospital a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Narayana Medical College and Hospital is a distinguished institution offering PG Diploma, MD, MS, DM, M.Ch, MBBS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Narayana Medical College and Hospital is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Narayana Medical College and Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 3.82 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.55 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4.15 for Faculty, and 3.85 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Narayana Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience of mine at this college is good, and the placement is given 5.

content.Placements: Our batch size is 250 members. Everyone will get a one-year paid internship in our college hospital, and stipend paid is 15,000. In MBBS every college has the same rule but the stipend paid is varied from college to college. Everyone should work compulsory for one year to get the degree.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms have central ACs with projectors and screens. Classrooms are very big. The library of this college is the best thing and very large when compared to other colleges. Hostel also has central AC. The food in mess is okay, and there is a canteen with all varieties of food items and juices.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Narayana Medical College, Nellore.

content.Placements: No one tries to grab a job right after MBBS. Providing information about NEET PG and free online subscriptions in doc tutorials and sessions with top professors is a good thing. Patient exposure is good as OP intake is higher.
content.Infrastructure: This college has the best infrastructure in Andhra Pradesh medical colleges. Different types of hostel rooms with or without attached bathrooms are available. There is a canteen in each block. There is a beautiful ground. The quality of food is above average. The library is large and air-conditioned. Lecture galleries are like movie theatres.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good average food to survive that's enough. And overall good college with enough facilities.

content.Placements: Duty medical officer is the post offered most commonly is the post offered to immediate MBBS pass outs. Packages around 50k to 40k are offered. Study rooms are also available. And duty timings are not much hectic. And 10% of people prefer to join the same hospital after studies.
content.Infrastructure: Hygiene maintained well. Good hostel facilities its just that the timings of girls hostel alone are strict good greenery around. And good ambience, ATM facility and play grounds are all available and tournaments of university and freshers day are all held.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good for medical field courses.

content.Placements: In our college, internship is provided in self located hospital. Students are placed in multi speciality hospitals for training and for jobs. Top roles offered in our college is cardiology training for students in final year and also in house surgeon training.
content.Infrastructure: Medical labs are provided with multi specialty equipment. Classrooms are provided with air conditioners and library is well stocked with books. Canteen food is very hygiene as it also serves for patients and families in hospital. Medical facilities are provided all over the campus in each block separately. Hostel food is very neat and hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college infrastructure, faculty members and all thing are good.

content.Placements: Placements are good, and pursuing PG in this college is good. There is a super speciality facility. There is a good number of patients, and there is a maximum of PG courses. Almost 98% of the students got internships in our college. The salary package offered is also good, but it depends on the course we are doing.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. There is a central library, and in the library, e-learning is also available. Biometrics facilities needed in this COVID time are also available. The encouragement from college is also good, and the college is also supportive, clean and hygienic. Roads are also clean. Hostel food is very good as our home food.

cut_off.college_name: Narayana Medical College and Hospital Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Narayana Medical College and Hospital cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Narayana Medical College and Hospital NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 727 and 4761, with M.Ch. being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Narayana Medical College and Hospital M.Ch. cutoff 2025 ranged between 727 and 2786 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 727, M.Ch. in Surgical Gastroenterology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider M.Ch. in Urology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

Candidates appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table given below to view or download the consolidated round-wise cutoff PDFs. The cutoff PDFs are available round-wise for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Must know facts about my college, which will help you build your career.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% students get placement every year. A minimum 5 lakh to maximum 10 lakh package is offered. There are several companies conducting training and recruitment programs in college like Accenture, TCS, etc. Recently, there was job fair in college companies by LIC, UJJIVAN, etc. Around 60% of students get internships in companies like Ujjivan, Vocational Valley, LIC, and NITDP. Roles like marketer, hotel management, finance, accountant, sales, HR and so many more are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides theoretical knowledge along with practical knowledge. There is a library so that students of each department can find their books; a science lab is there for each medical department; a computer lab is there for those students who are interested in technical knowledge; and a moot court is there for the students of the law department. Since I was outside, I had to stay in hostel, but there is no hostel for both boys and girls, so I am staying in PG currently, Our college has a canteen, but only minimum variety of food is available. I hope they will provide more varieties. Sports activities are also held on annual basis, like 100-meter race, volleyball, cricket, tug-of-war, etc. Extra curricular activities are also there. Our college always conducts management day every year and various competitions like essay writing, mehndi competition, rangoli making, etc. are also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Average college with average quality courses, faculty is good, and NAAC A+ college .

review_content.Placements: College in terms of placement is not that great. 10% of students get the placements and the highest package was around 25000. The top recruiters are TCS, Accenture, and Amazon. 25–30% of students got internships. Roles offered are kind of BPO in BBA placement and the rarest you can get is the assistance manager role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Career College is currently renovating. It has smart classes, library, auditorium, a biolab, smooth court, labs, Wi-Fi, etc. Career College do not have hostel facility. It has a small canteen with no arrangements for sitting but the food is good. It has medical facilities; we get the medical college side by side with the career college. And there are NSS and NCC.

review_summary.college_name: CCB Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Career College Bhopal has more than 55+ years of academic experience.

content.Placements: 25 students shortlisted from my batch in Accenture these year The average package nearly 5LPA and highest package 7 LPA The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Accenture, TCS, Etc. Nearly 90% students got internship in my course Top roles offered in my course is Data science, Data analytics, Programmers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College have very good library, smart classrooms, computer science labs, Chemistry Labs etc. They don't provide any hostel but if you want PG college will gonna Search a Good PG for you with low price. And college also have free wifi. They also conduct various sports events. College canteen is decent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Bhopal to study computer application.

content.Placements: College has very good placement rate. In my class, there are 7 students who got placed in different companies. I also got placed in Accenture this year. The college is going to provide you training before placement, and the average package offered is 3.65 LPA from companies like TCS, Accenture, Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College has very good computer labs, library, and canteen, and smart classrooms for everyone. They don't have any hostel facility, but if you want, the college is going to search for a better budget PG for you to live in. The canteen food is amazing; they have everything freshly made.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Must know facts about my college, which will help you build your career.

content.Placements: Almost 70% students get placement every year. A minimum 5 lakh to maximum 10 lakh package is offered. There are several companies conducting training and recruitment programs in college like Accenture, TCS, etc. Recently, there was job fair in college companies by LIC, UJJIVAN, etc. Around 60% of students get internships in companies like Ujjivan, Vocational Valley, LIC, and NITDP. Roles like marketer, hotel management, finance, accountant, sales, HR and so many more are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides theoretical knowledge along with practical knowledge. There is a library so that students of each department can find their books; a science lab is there for each medical department; a computer lab is there for those students who are interested in technical knowledge; and a moot court is there for the students of the law department. Since I was outside, I had to stay in hostel, but there is no hostel for both boys and girls, so I am staying in PG currently, Our college has a canteen, but only minimum variety of food is available. I hope they will provide more varieties. Sports activities are also held on annual basis, like 100-meter race, volleyball, cricket, tug-of-war, etc. Extra curricular activities are also there. Our college always conducts management day every year and various competitions like essay writing, mehndi competition, rangoli making, etc. are also there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Average college with average quality courses, faculty is good, and NAAC A+ college .

content.Placements: College in terms of placement is not that great. 10% of students get the placements and the highest package was around 25000. The top recruiters are TCS, Accenture, and Amazon. 25–30% of students got internships. Roles offered are kind of BPO in BBA placement and the rarest you can get is the assistance manager role.
content.Infrastructure: Career College is currently renovating. It has smart classes, library, auditorium, a biolab, smooth court, labs, Wi-Fi, etc. Career College do not have hostel facility. It has a small canteen with no arrangements for sitting but the food is good. It has medical facilities; we get the medical college side by side with the career college. And there are NSS and NCC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students.

content.Placements: It was one of the best colleges in Bhopal for education, learning, and placements. Top recruiting company was TCS. Around 75% of students got placed in multinational companies. The average salary package offered ranges between 5 LPA - 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and ICICI Bank. I would recommend students to join this college. Almost 80% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very good. The infrastructure was well-maintained. Laboratories were decent. Classrooms were excellent. There was a decent library in this college. The food served in the canteen was good. Medical facilities were available. There was a hospital on our campus.

admission_overview.college_name: CCB Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_overview.title: Career College Bhopal Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Career College Bhopal admissions are based on merit of the candidates. The college considers the qualifying exam marks of the aspirants for selection. Career College Bhopal offers UG, PG, Hons. with Research and Appreticeship Embedded Degree courses. The college offers courses in affiliation with Barkatullah University. Aspirants must contact the college to know about the selection process and application fees.

eligibility_selection.title: Career College Bhopal Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Career College Bhopal selects candidates based on their merit. Aspirants must contact the college for exact selection process. Below are the popular Career College Bhopal courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in any stream with a minimum of 45% aggregate
Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 33%-45% aggregate
UG degree in relevant subjects with at least 45%-50% aggregate

faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board can apply for BCA at Career College Bhopal. The minimum aggregate required to apply for BCA is 45%. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BCA at Career College Bhopal?

admission_process.title: Career College Bhopal Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Career College Bhopal admissions are open currently. Candidates can fill out the application form for the preferred course. Check below the steps to get admission at Career College:
1.Application Process:Aspirants have to first apply online or contact the admission office for offline form.
2.Selection:The college reviews the application forms of the candidates to confirm eligibility. Candidates must contact the college to know the exact selection process.
3.Admission Confirmation:Selected candidates receives admission confirmation from the college. They further need to pay theCareer College Bhopal feesto confirm their seat.

courses_data.name: Career College Bhopal BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Career College Bhopal offers BSc for four-years at the UG level. The college offers BSc inComputer Science, Information Technology, Physics,Maths, Biotechnology, etc. Besides, CCB also offersBSc Nursingfor four-years. Candidates need to complete Class 12 to apply for any of the offered BSc specialisations. The selection for this course is merit-based.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc at Career College Bhopal?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 in relevant Science subjects from a recognised board are eligible to apply for BSc course at Career College Bhopal. The minimum aggregate required ranges between 33% and 45% and varies with the specialisation.

courses_data.name: Career College Bhopal MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Career College Bhopal offers a two-year MSc course at the PG level. The college offers MSc in various specialisations such asBiotechnology, Microbiology, Chemistry,Zoology,Botany, etc. Candidates are shortlisted for MSc course based on their qualifying exam scores. Aspirants who have completed their graduation are eligible to apply for this course.

faqs.question: Which are the MSc specialisations offered at Career College Bhopal?
faqs.answer: Career College Bhopal offers MSc for two-years. The course is offered at the PG level in various specialisations. Below is the list of some of the offered specialisations:BiotechnologyMicrobiologyChemistryZoologyBotany, etc.

Aspirants who have completed their graduation are eligible to apply for this course.

faqs.question: Which are the MSc specialisations offered at Career College Bhopal?
faqs.answer: Career College Bhopal offers MSc for two-years. The course is offered at the PG level in various specialisations. Below is the list of some of the offered specialisations:BiotechnologyMicrobiologyChemistryZoologyBotany, etc.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Career College Bhopal?
faqs.answer: Career College Bhopal offers admission to candidates based on their merit. The college considers qualifying exam marks of the aspirants for selection. Candidates must contact the college for the complete selection process.

placement_data.title: Career College Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Career College placement report for 2025 has been released. As per the report, a total of 630 students registered for placements out of which 556 students were placed. The highest and average package recorded during Career College placements 2025 was INR 9.5 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA. While, the lowest package stood at INR 2.7 LPA . Overall 124 companies participated and provided 556 offers during the 2025 Career College placement season.

reviews.review_text: Overall the infrastructure is good. There are playground, canteen, computer lab, library, huge hall for functions. All of them are good. Students still has network issues. Mobiles don't get good network. The food available in canteen is good. The medical facilities is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for students. The quality of the mess is good and hygienic. The canteen has a variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Career College.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not good. Our campus is clear. It also provides a laboratory. Sports facilities are not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is not good in college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is only available for first-year female students in our college. There is no hostel facility for boys. The hostel contains a canteen and dining hall. It is not very well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college about good placements.
reviews.review_text: A Campus-wide wireless computing network is in place that provides Wi-Fi signal is weak, the library is good, and the food quality is also good. Sports and medical facilities are good. Games staff are also genuine people in sports and singing and dance.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are helpful. Placement drives are okay.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-equipped with the basic infrastructure and facilities. There are old school kind of classrooms. There is a canteen, an auditorium, small garden ( where they don't actually allow anyone to sit). The sanitation services are not upto the mark but other than that it is a decent college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good and the diversification of students subject-wise is good.

college_info.college_name: CCB

data.description: Career College campus boasts state-of-the-art infrastructure , including well-designed classrooms,  24/7 computer labs, a modern library, and a spacious auditorium. The college offers a wide range of amenities to cater to the needs of its students. Career College Bhopal library houses an extensive collection of textbooks, reference books, bound journals, national and international journals, magazines, and newspapers. Notably, Career College is the only college in Bhopal to have a fully automated and well-equipped library with the latest SOUL 2.0 version. the college has a parent hospital , Career Institute of Medical Sciences (CIMS), located on the campus. Equipped with over 150 beds, advanced medical technology, and highly experienced doctors. College Career campus offers a robust internet connection and Wi-Fi facility. Additionally, the college provides modern facilities such as a counseling room, auditorium and seminar hall, canteen, and fitness center.

reviews_list.review_title: The name of excellence in medical teaching is Lala Lajpat Rai Memorial Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Lala Lajpat Rai Memorial Medical College is a government medical college affiliated with Chaudhary Charan Singh University Meerut. As I'm from batch 2023 pursuing an MBBS from LLRMMC. I am very grateful and lucky that I chose this college and the college accepted me. As LLRMMC carves the finest doctors, my quality of education and clinical exposure is brilliant. 5th year also known as the internship year is completed in the college hospital itself with a stipend of Rs. 17,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of LLRMMC is good with an advanced classroom having a projector as well as white & blackboard. Labs are advanced & full of resources that help in exposure to practical topics. The central library is fully AC & has Wi-Fi for the UG & PGs. The library contains all the resourceful books and research. As it's one of the oldest colleges in UP the hostel building is good & reliable, and new hostel building work is in progress. Food given in mess is good. The canteen is nice & hygienic. Outdoor & indoor ground for sports & games. Medical facilities are good with emergency services.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Finally, you will appreciate yourself. You are at an amazing place.

review_content.Placements: Our course is MBBS, so we deal with both theoretical and practical aspects. The best thing is that we give our all to save people's lives. By the way, being a doctor is one of the best professions in this world, and we don't really need placements as we provide service in hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: As I am in a government medical college, the infrastructure is not so great, but it is manageable. All facilities and functions occur, which is very important for surviving the 5.5-year journey, which is huge. Overall, I can say that it’s good!

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good studies, excellent college life, and infra is improving.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements as such because there is None in the medical professions. Most of the students go for PG entrance and the college has good PG entrance passing ratio. Also whoever doesn't opt for PG usually joins as a non PG jr in the college itself or nearby with a pay 60k-70k.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is over half a century old so the infrastructure is not that good. But it provides all the facilities of labs. Classrooms and library are newly built with modern infrastructure and library also provides Wi-Fi facility. Hostels are old but new hostels are under construction.

review_summary.college_name: Lala Lajpat Rai Memorial Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college to pursue MBBS.

content.Placements: Almost all students are easily placed. The highest package is about 1.2 LPA, and the average package is about 1 LPA. All students get internships with a stipend. You have to serve a compulsory two-year bond, or you can break the bond by paying 10 lakhs to the government.
content.Infrastructure: As it is an old college, the infrastructure has also aged over time, but overall it is good compared to other old colleges. The hostel is average, with 2-seater rooms for first-year students and single rooms from the second year onward. There is no Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This is the best medical college.

content.Placements: There are a total of 150 students, and the package offered is Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 per month. 100% of students do an internship at LLRM Medical College. After passing, students are required to fulfill a compulsory bond by working in a government hospital for 2 years, and handsome salaries are provided for the same.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is old, but all the facilities provided are really good. The labs, classrooms, and library are very good and well-furnished. The food quality in the canteen is good, and there is a pay-per-meal system. A wide range of sports is played, and a sports fest is also organized. The Madnova cultural program is also organized every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college to pursue MBBS.
reviews.review_text: As it is an old college, the infrastructure has also aged over time, but overall it is good compared to other old colleges. The hostel is average, with 2-seater rooms for first-year students and single rooms from the second year onward. There is no Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best medical college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old, but all the facilities provided are really good. The labs, classrooms, and library are very good and well-furnished. The food quality in the canteen is good, and there is a pay-per-meal system. A wide range of sports is played, and a sports fest is also organized. The Madnova cultural program is also organized every year.

reviews.review_heading: The name of excellence in medical teaching is Lala Lajpat Rai Memorial Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of LLRMMC is good with an advanced classroom having a projector as well as white & blackboard. Labs are advanced & full of resources that help in exposure to practical topics. The central library is fully AC & has Wi-Fi for the UG & PGs. The library contains all the resourceful books and research. As it's one of the oldest colleges in UP the hostel building is good & reliable, and new hostel building work is in progress. Food given in mess is good. The canteen is nice & hygien...

reviews.review_heading: Finally, you will appreciate yourself. You are at an amazing place.
reviews.review_text: As I am in a government medical college, the infrastructure is not so great, but it is manageable. All facilities and functions occur, which is very important for surviving the 5.5-year journey, which is huge. Overall, I can say that it’s good!

reviews.review_heading: Good studies, excellent college life, and infra is improving.
reviews.review_text: The college is over half a century old so the infrastructure is not that good. But it provides all the facilities of labs. Classrooms and library are newly built with modern infrastructure and library also provides Wi-Fi facility. Hostels are old but new hostels are under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Best medical college of west UP.
reviews.review_text: MBBS course is of about 5 and a half years which includes internship of one year and consists about 19 subjects. We have dedicated labs for practical learning which emphasizes strictly on gaining knowledge. We have a central library, in which there is free Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the finest government UP colleges for an MBBS degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college and hospital was good. Our college was well-equipped and an adequate number of lecture halls, and laboratories were provided. It also provides a big library which was newly constructed. Hostel buildings were renovated 2 years back with new electric wiring and new washrooms. The rooms were spacious enough for one student. But sometimes 2 students were allotted in 1 room which gets congested.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as it is a government based university of MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Campus is the best. Classrooms are well-equipped with air-conditioners. Library has lots of systematic books. Quality of food is good. Quality of rooms is good with air-conditioners and non-air-conditioners. Badminton and basketball courts are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the prestigious medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good, and the campus has its own central library with Wi-Fi facilities, a stadium and a football ground. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and air-conditioning. The labs are good, and all the materials are available. There are about 15 mess facilities present on the campus, and each with good quality food. The college fests are organised every year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lala Lajpat Rai Memorial Medical College.
reviews.review_text: Library ofcourse present with high speed wiffi. Hostel rooms are not in much good condition but they don't necessarily required in good condition as u can adjust urself there. Food is ofcourse good a u have to vharge them accordingly to urself. More than 1 mess is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of a good selection in PG exam.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility available in our college is pathetic. However, some labs are well-equipped, but some needs to be improved. Classrooms are not good, as the windows are broken. Air-conditioners are installed in them, but they are not working. Some of the lecture theatres are very good, but mostly they are poor in terms of infrastructure. The library is excellent, but hostel conditions are pathetic. Rooms are very dirty, and the toilets are broken. Even some toilets don't have gates. There are no sw...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, environment and knowledge.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are above average and infrastructure is also good some buildings are newly constructed and some about 50 years ago. But everything is fine. Wi-Fi facility still unavailable but not required.  
Hostel rooms are quite adequate, healthy environment, food is edible As home food is always best.

reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is not good enough.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very good in this college, as we have many hospitals attached to it. Around 50 to 60 percent of students get their placements every year, and the average salary package is 5 LPA. The students get their internships after 4.5 years of academics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very bad. There is no canteen, and the food in the mess is also not good. The facility for sports for students is also not good. There is no supply of drinking water, so students have to carry their own water bottle. The library is good, and this is one of the best things about this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfying facilities and good placements in 2021.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 99% students got government jobs in medical officer exams or UPSC CMS exams. Approximately 15-20 students every year were selected for NEET PG exams and got various branches in Rajasthan or any other state. All the students studying at GMC Kota do internship from the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is medium. The college building is old but the facilities are good. There is no water supply in the college building. Students carry their own water bottles for drinking. There is a large library containing lots of books. Wi-fi is not available for 24 hours in the hostels. Mess food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College studies are very good but infrastructure is dissatisfactory.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really good in this college, courses offered are MBBS, MD and DM in field of doctors and placements are very good as we have many hospitals attached to it. Internship starts after 4.5 years of academics and is very helpful as well as has a good stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not quite good and the building is old and all the departments become troublesome during rain as the water drains from the roof and floor both. There is no canteen in the college at all and hostels are quite messy and all grounds for sports are in bad shape.
