review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Kota Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college in Rajasthan because of placement, facilities, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent. About 35% students in every batch are selected into their further branch for upcoming studies. There are no packages in medical studies. Here, we considered a seat in postgraduate colleges as placement. Overall, this college is best for upcoming studies and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was opened in 1992, and since its opening, every batch has done well in studies in their era due to the college's best infrastructure for the MBBS course. There are different labs in every department. Labs are in good condition. There is a central library, where students come and study quietly.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Story of a fantastic five years.

content.Placements: Placement here depends on cracking exams like NEET PG or for a medical officer or UPSC CMS. After completion of MBBS, you can start your private clinic. The college provides a 1-year internship program too, and after that, you can either work under a senior doctor or prepare for PG exams.
content.Infrastructure: There are many hostels here: 2 for postgraduates and 4 for undergraduates, both for boys and girls. The girls' hostels are managed well, but boys' hostel management is not up to the mark. The infrastructure of the college building is good, with quite a large campus, and there is also an air-conditioned library.

gallery_page.college_name: GMC Photos & Videos

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best college in Rajasthan because of placement, facilities, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college was opened in 1992, and since its opening, every batch has done well in studies in their era due to the college's best infrastructure for the MBBS course. There are different labs in every department. Labs are in good condition. There is a central library, where students come and study quietly.

reviews.review_heading: Story of a fantastic five years.
reviews.review_text: There are many hostels here: 2 for postgraduates and 4 for undergraduates, both for boys and girls. The girls' hostels are managed well, but boys' hostel management is not up to the mark. The infrastructure of the college building is good, with quite a large campus, and there is also an air-conditioned library.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is not good enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very bad. There is no canteen, and the food in the mess is also not good. The facility for sports for students is also not good. There is no supply of drinking water, so students have to carry their own water bottle. The library is good, and this is one of the best things about this college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfying facilities and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is medium. The college building is old but the facilities are good. There is no water supply in the college building. Students carry their own water bottles for drinking. There is a large library containing lots of books. Wi-fi is not available for 24 hours in the hostels. Mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: College studies are very good but infrastructure is dissatisfactory.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not quite good and the building is old and all the departments become troublesome during rain as the water drains from the roof and floor both. There is no canteen in the college at all and hostels are quite messy and all grounds for sports are in bad shape.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college, as it has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: GMC Kotak has good infrastructure. The campus is huge. Mess and canteen are good. The hostel infrastructure is good. Sports events are held from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Average satisfaction with this average government college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is medium, and the college building is good. There is no water supply in the college building, students carry their water bottles for drinking water. There is no Wi-Fi for students in the college building. The library is awesome and new. GMC Kota's library is one of the best libraries in Rajasthan. Wi-Fi is not available for students in the library. Hostels are not good, least water supply, and the least cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: It is not the college I thought it would be while taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. The newly built lecture theatre does not have any kind of electricity. We have to sit in hot and humid classes full of sweat. There are six air conditioners, but only one works. There is no supply of water, hence there are busted toilets which are never repaired even after complaining. We were promised Wi-Fi in the college and library in 2019, which we didn't get. The library is the only thing that is good in this whole college. Hostels are not good. There are bus...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Kota.
reviews.review_text: The hostel in our college is not so good but it is under renovation. It will definitely become very good and well-furnished in the future. Hostels have a 24*7 water supply as well as electricity supply every single day of the week of every month.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely it is the best medical college because of best teachers, environment and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are of top-level here. The library is the best place to study, and there must be a good collection of books and study materials in the library. The food served in the hostel is also good, including canteen and medical facilities. Our college is superb in terms of sports and games. There is a gym in our college which is very helpful in our sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with great infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: Government medical college, kotak is ranked number 2 after SMS Medical College in terms of infrastructure and academics. There are 6 lecture theatres in total,  2 Libraries, a central ground, a cricket ground, a basketball court, a volleyball court, a badminton court and a gymnasium all in very good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Yes good and faculty members also good.
reviews.review_text: Good and Wi-Fi available in our class and lt rooms and library also we'll and e library also present in our college campus and classrooms are well feature and college hostel also good mess food test and. Healthy and college canteen also there and sports and games week also good and Interacting .

reviews.review_heading: Professors are very good infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: College is one of the oldest medical college in Rajasthan so the infrastructure is not that good but it is improving day by day we are seeing new hostels. New lectures theater are made. Library is very good you can study in it good in condition as it is newly made.

reviews.review_heading: Love the faculty here. Especially the anatomy department.
reviews.review_text: We have gym labs lecture theatre. Abd other facilities. Overall infrastructure wise its good and developing. Academic block is developing. Hostels are in excellent conditions. Lecture theatre are perfect and well maintained. Well built college campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied by the infrastructure and our college teachers are awesome.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not quite good, the building is old and all the departments become closed during rain as the water rains from the roof and floor. There is no canteen in the college at all and the hostels are quite a mess. All the sports fields are in bad shape.

BTech at this university is offered across various specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, CSE (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning), CSE (Artificial Intelligence & Data Science), and ECE (Internet of Things). placements.overview:

admission_process.title: MNR University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MNR University admission 2025 is open for all courses. The university gives distinct courses at UG and PG levels. The university offers merit-based admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for admission to BTech and BSc, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such as TS EAMCET or any state-level entrance test or national-level entrance test.

Candidates looking for admission toMNR Universitycan apply on the official website of the university. To know more about MNR University admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

MNR University offers both entrance and merit-based admission to UG and PG courses. Candidates looking for university admission are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria to get admission. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board, and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree.

Further, for BTech and BSc courses, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for admission. Check the below table forMNR University courseeligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
- Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as mandatory subjects from a recognised board
- Candidates must have completed 16 years of age as on 31st December of the year of admission
- Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board
- Candidates must be at least 17 years old as of December 31 of the admission year.
Merit-Based / Entrance-Based
Class 10 and Class 12 with Biology, Physics, and Chemistry.
Merit-Based
Graduation degree with 55% aggregate from a recognised board
Merit-Based

MNR University admission process 2025is ongoing on the official website of the university. The university accepts various entrance exam scores, such as TS EAMCET or any state-level or national-level entrance exam, for admission to BTech and BSc courses. Further, for admission to other UG and PG courses including BPT and MPT, the university offers merit-based admission. Check below for the step-by-stepMNR Universityadmission process:
Step 1: MNR University Application Process 2025

MNR University application is conducted on its official website. The eligible candidates are to apply online on the official website of the university. It is mandatory that the eligible candidates have completed the entrance exam formalities for BTech courses and must have qualified for the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the university.
Step 2: MNR University Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech and BSc courses. The university accepts TS EAMCET and other state-level entrance tests or national-level entrance exams for admission to BTech and BSc. Further, for other courses, the university offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to pay theMNR University feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech admissions at MNR University?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for admission to BTech at MNR University candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board. Further, candidates must appear for the accepted entrance exam TS EAMCET or any state and national level entrance exam . After fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to visit the official website of the university to apply online.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.Tech at MNR University?
faqs.answer: MNR University offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Further, for other courses including BSc, MSc, BPT and MPT, the college offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission to BTech are required to apply and appear for TS EAMCET or any other state and national level entrance exam. Additionally, for other courses candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria set by the college.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BTech courses at MNR University?
faqs.answer: To get admissions into BTech at MNR University, candidates are required to qualify for the basic eligibility first, which is completion of Class 12 from the Science stream (PCM subjects). Moreover, the admission is based on merit, and the university accepts scores from state/national-based entrance exams. Therefore, the admission is either merit-based or entrance-based. Moreover, the information about direct admission is not explicitly mentioned on the official website of the university.

faqs.question: Can I apply for MNR University admission?
faqs.answer: MNR University admissions are open for all courses. The college offers merit and entrance-based admission to all UG and PG courses. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to full fill the criteria set by the university. After fill out the criteria, candidates seeking admission to MNR University must fill out the online application form by visiting the university official website.

faqs.question: Explain the step-by-step admission process of MNR University.
faqs.answer: MNR University admission 2025 carried out in online mode. The university offers various at UG and PG courses. The university offers both merit and entrance-based admission. Here is the step-by-step admissions process for the MNR University:Step 1: Application ProcessThe eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of MNR University. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed the entrance exam formalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria.Step 2: Selection ProcessAdmission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech and BSc. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission.Step 3: Admission ConfirmationAfter candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MNR University?
faqs.answer: MNR University offers entrance-based admission to BTech and BSc. Further, for other courses, such as BPT and MPT university offers merit-based admission. Applicants seeking admission to BTech and BSc must appear for entrance exams accepted by the university, Further, candidates are also required to complete the basic eligiblity i.e pass Class 12 for UG courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BPT courses at MNR University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility requirements to get admission to the BPT course at MNR University are that candidates must complete their Class 12 from Science stream, specifically PCB. Further, on the basis of performance in the higher senior secondary, the university releases the merit of shortlisted candidates. Additionally, the acceptance of direct admissions for the BPT course at MNR University is not explicitly mentioned on the official website of the university.

facilities: Classrooms: MNR University has spacious modern classrooms. The institute has adequate space in the classrooms for a comfortable sitting arrangement.
Laboratories: The institute has state-of-the-art of art facilities and equipment in all the laboratories.
Hostels: MNR University has separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostel's facilities include AC, telephones and internet, etc.

Sports and Recreation: The sports facilities of the university include adequate space for students interested in playing various sports. This is essential for an overall growth and development of students.
Other Facilities: Some of the additional facilities include 24-hour video surveillance at the university. There is a students' canteen, and MOUS with top MNCS and industry majors are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members here are good, but the infrastructure is bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is not much good, and labs are also not much good. However, the quality of the food served is good, and there are good medical facilities. Sports are also available, and the Wi-Fi facility is good. Classrooms are not bad.

placements.overview:
Global Institute of Healthcare Management is an institute in Delhi. At the UG, PG and Certificate levels, the institute offers 107 courses across 22 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Global Institute of Healthcare Management programs include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA. Global Institute of Healthcare Management courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media and Humanities & Social Sciences, etc. The fees at Global Institute of Healthcare Management ranges between INR 8,000 to 7,60,500 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

college_info.intro: Malla Reddy University Powered by Emversity provides a BSc (H) in Health Psychology in the School of Health Sciences (Paramedical) in Dialysis Technology, Respiratory Technology and Health Psychology with 60 Seats for each programme. Malla Reddy University Powered by Emversity offers BSc (Hons) UG degree in Respiratory Technology, Dialysis Technology and Health Psychology for the duration of 4 years. Below are the details regarding the Malla Reddy University Powered by Emversity popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Malla Reddy University Powered by Emversity provides an undergraduate programme and the course includes a BSc(H) in Health Psychology. The university offers a UG degree such as BSc (Hons) fro the duration of 4 years in streams such as Respiratory Technology, Dialysis Technology and Health Psychology. review_summary.college_name: Malla Reddy University Powered by Emversity Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Dental Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Study-wise it is good, good communication of faculty.

content.Placements: 70-85 percent are placed in my college, with 3.45 LPA. The companies in my college are Infosys, TCS, Accenture, Amazon, and some other companies, with 80 percent percentage. Maximum employee jobs only we got. In interviews, some companies are just asking about the basic topics.
content.Infrastructure: My college is good, and we got very good teaching faculty. Wi-Fi is okay, not much; it depends on the weather. Classrooms are good, and atmosphere is also good. Coming to library, it is very peaceful and helpful for all kinds of students based on their course. The quality of college hostel is not much good, better to stay in private hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Dental Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the faculty, average placements, and the only good thing is the infrastructure.

content.Placements: Only about 10 percent of the students got placed, which is very low for the students studying here and graduating from here. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Infosys is the top company recruiting. Internships are based on the course students choose. Internships are more for Master's students because there are fewer people studying those courses.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, with labs for students, good classrooms with a digital board that helps the lecturers to teach programming to the students easily. Wi-Fi connection is available. Hostel facilities are quite good, and the canteen food is nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Health Psychology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our university is one of the best universities to study at. It is full of AI technology.

content.Placements: In our college, there are 80% of placements offered. Many big MNC companies visit the campus. Many students get many placement offers. In different courses, we get many placements. 50% of students in our course are placed very well, with many good offers.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has libraries, a cafeteria, labs, digital boards, good benches, and many facilities. The college is full of greenery, with many plants and trees. The college also has bus facilities and Wi-Fi. In our canteen, they serve hygienic food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Respiratory Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good. I refer this college to students.

content.Placements: 75% students are placed in our college. Highest package in our college is 25 LPA. The lowest package is 10 LPA. Many companies are linked to our college. The 80% of students got placements in our college. Amazon, Infosys, and other companies are liked.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure is very good. The facilities are very friendly to students. They clarify very small doubts without irritation. All facilities are available in our college, like a gym, library, sports area, canteen, etc. Our campus is green.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Dental Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Why do I choose over others.

content.Placements: Out of 200 students, the highest salary is 2 LPA and the lowest is 1 LPA. 80% of students get internships. Based on interviews, they select students, and we receive good placements with high salary packages. We also have a lot of scope in the future with my course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good, and we also have good food with a hygienic mess. We have medical facilities, and sports and games are encouraged, allowing us to enjoy a lot in our college. We have a library, labs, clean and neat classrooms. There are plenty of books in the library at my college.

Coming to library, it is very peaceful and helpful for all kinds of students based on their course. The quality of college hostel is not much good, better to stay in private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty, average placements, and the only good thing is the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with labs for students, good classrooms with a digital board that helps the lecturers to teach programming to the students easily. Wi-Fi connection is available. Hostel facilities are quite good, and the canteen food is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is one of the best universities to study at. It is full of AI technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college has libraries, a cafeteria, labs, digital boards, good benches, and many facilities. The college is full of greenery, with many plants and trees. The college also has bus facilities and Wi-Fi. In our canteen, they serve hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. I refer this college to students.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is very good. The facilities are very friendly to students. They clarify very small doubts without irritation. All facilities are available in our college, like a gym, library, sports area, canteen, etc. Our campus is green.

reviews.review_heading: Why do I choose over others.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good, and we also have good food with a hygienic mess. We have medical facilities, and sports and games are encouraged, allowing us to enjoy a lot in our college. We have a library, labs, clean and neat classrooms. There are plenty of books in the library at my college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty are good, and placements are also very satisfying.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities and infrastructure is good and premium. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are also excellent, with a well digital boards and premium benches that comfortably fit three members per bench. Classrooms are also very spacious.

reviews.review_heading: It's not that knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. And as per hostel, it's not worth the money. Hostel fee is too high than the usual fee. Hostel food is not worth the money. It doesn't taste bad but the quality is not nice. We need to pay extra money to use washing machines.

reviews.review_heading: Shaping Future: A Blend of Academics and Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very vast, with 300 acres of campus. It consists of multiple large grounds for different sports and a big cafeteria. The classrooms contain upstairs benches with great ventilation, and they also have smart boards (Maxhub). Coming to the hostel, it consists of 3 beds in a single room, and the mess is very clean and good. The cafeteria food is also very good, with affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: The college was so good, with good faculty and technology. We have our first batch in this course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were good; we have Wi-Fi in class, and they explain on PC monitors so we can understand everything digitally. We have labs and a library. In the lab, we do every practical with every human body so that we can understand simply by doing this. The hostel was good, with Wi-Fi and good food in the hostel and canteens.

reviews.review_heading: The industry-aligned curriculum and smart infrastructure in every classroom highlights
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Malla Reddy University is quite modern and student-friendly. Our department had well-equipped classrooms with smart boards, and this all makes the learning environment very modern and comfortable for the students. The faculty are friendly with students.

reviews.review_heading: We have very good placements in our college.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure in our college. We have very good labs, classrooms, and very good Wi-Fi. There is a lot of greenery in our college, with plenty of plants and trees. In our cafeteria, they provide very good and hygienic food in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: You can join the university, and with your knowledge. You can crack the campus interview.
reviews.review_text: The library and infrastructure are good in my college, especially in the department. The university is good. Labs and canteen are also good. The medical facilities are good as well. We especially love to play games. The classrooms are also very neat and good. We are enjoying our time here.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend the college to students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and we have many trees and a beautiful natural environment. We have labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and AC, and the campus looks very nice. In our college hostel, we have good food and a tiffin cafeteria, and we are friendly with the staff there.

reviews.review_heading: You can join this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, labs are good, the department is good, and the infrastructure is good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is okay. Medical facilities are available, and sports are well played.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for B.Tech and B.Sc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. Wi-Fi, labs, a digital lab, a computer lab, and a clean and big library. Clean washrooms and classrooms were available here. The canteen food was good, and there was fresh air treatment. A big sports ground, weekend games were conducted here, and tournaments were also held on many festivals and occasions.

college_info.college_name: Shoolini University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary:
Shoolini University Application – APPLY NOW

Shoolini University is ranked 503 by the QS World Rankings 2026 in the 'World University' category.

Shoolini University admissions 2026 are open for UG and PG courses. Interested candidates can go to university's portal to apply for their desired programme.

college_info.intro:
BTech and BSc, are the flagship programmes at Shoolini University . Shoolini University BTech & BSc are the full-time four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The BTech programme offered at Shoolini University include 2+2 Study Abroad Programmes which means first 2 years at Shoolini University & final 2 years at a leading university abroad. Shoolini University has strong academic bonds with 250+ higher educational institutions in 28+ countries.
Did you know? The highest package offered during 2025 BTech placements was INR 42 LPA. Some of the top recruiters that visit Shoolini University campus for BTech & BSc placements include Biocon, Mankind, Genpact, LG Electronics, Bank of America, Nestle etc.

placements.overview:
Every year Shoolini University provides close to five hundred scholarships to deserving students. Types of offered scholarships are need based, merit cum need & purely merit scholarships. Scholarship will be given as tuition fee waiver ranging between 10% and 100%.

Given below are the different types of Shoolini University scholarships offered at Shoolini University:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great infrastructure, updated curriculum, and more. Come if a remote location is not a problem.

review_content.Placements: The real data is that about 90% of all students got placed. The top package this year is about 12 LPA, the lowest is about 3 LPA, and the average package is about 6 LPA. There are no very big names among the companies (on-campus), and the top ones are TCS & Infosys. Most students got internships, including many completing their 1st year. Top roles are related to SDE, Data Science, and AI.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is pretty big and useful, with a huge set of books. Wi-Fi is amazing (hostel excluded). You'll find exceptions even on roads while you are walking on campus. Classrooms & labs for this course in the AI building are unarguably one of the best in the country, not exaggerating. Hostel rooms are comparable to the ones from dorms of international universities, with the option of attached washrooms too. Even common washrooms are clean all the time as they're thoroughly cleaned several times throughout the day. Mess is pretty, and food is decent too. We have to pay extra for non-vegetarian food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Full Stack Developer - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are knowledgeable and supportive, always willing to help beyond expectations.

review_content.Placements: The program offers decent placement opportunities with reputed companies visiting the campus. While core jobs are available students with good internships have a better chance. The placement cell is supportive but its outreach could improve. This time I understand that my college is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course is well-developed with spacious classrooms, projectors and access to labs with updated equipment. The hostel is clean and secure offering basic amenities like Wi-Fi and laundry though food quality can improve.

courses.overview: Shoolini University Courses & Fees 2025 Shoolini University offers UG and PG level courses. The university offers programmes in Engineering. fee_structure.heading: Shoolini University Courses & Fees 2025
fee_structure.overview: Shoolini University offers UG and PG level courses. The university offers programmes in Engineering. Aspirants pursuing these courses from Shoolini University are open to career opportunities in the respective fields. Check below the fees, eligibility and selection criteria for the courses:

faqs.answer: Shoolini University offers a BCom programme with ACCA (Association of Chartered Certified Accountants UK). ACCA UK is a certification course that candidates can pursue while completing their BCom (Hons) degree. ACCA is a globally recognised qualification in Finance and Accounting offered by a UK body and is acknowledged in over 180 countries. Students have the chance to obtain ACCA (UK) Certification by clearing just 4 out of the 13 papers. Shoolini University B.Com with ACCA is a four years undergraduate level course. Applicants must meet the entry requirement of scoring at least 50.0% in their 12th grade to be admitted to Shoolini University's BCom with ACCA course.
faqs.question: Q: What is the B.Com with ACCA course at Shoolini University all about?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can apply directly to Shoolini University by following the application procedures. Admission at Shoolini University is decided by both entrance as well as merit. National-level entrance tests such as the SAT India, JEE Main, CUET, CAT, MAT, and so on are accepted by the university. For particular courses, Shoolini University administers the SU-SAT, its own entrance exam. More than 180 UG, PG, and PhD courses in a variety of subjects are available at the institution, including engineering, management, commerce, pharmacy, law, and more. For the engineering branch, it also provides summit research courses and lateral entrance admissions. In addition, the Shoolini University Centre for Distance and Online Education (SCDOE) provides BBA, BCom (Hons), and other courses.
faqs.question: Q: Can we join Shoolini University directly?

faqs.answer: For MBAs, Business Today 2023 ranks Shoolini University 88th. Four semesters make up the two-year, full-time, residential MBA programme. PG MBAs are available at Shoolini University in 11 specialisations. The university's approved entrance exam results are used to determine admission to the MBA programme. Approximately INR 5.95 Lacs is the total cost of tuition. 180 seats are available for MBA Communications. Data science, digital marketing, business analytics, supply chain and logistics management, human resources, and other areas are among the specialisations offered. Candidates must have earned a bachelor's degree in any field with a minimum of 50% overall to be eligible.
faqs.question: Q: Is Shoolini University good for MBA?

faqs.answer: Shoolini University BCom course is a four years honors degree course that has a total of eight semesters. The University also offers an international certification along with the BCom (Hons) degree. Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA-UK) certification is a global qualification in Finance and Accounting offered by a UK body. Candidates can only pursue BCom with ACCA while doing BCom (Hons) at Shoolini University.
faqs.question: Q: Is BCom three years course at Shooolini University?

There are two types of Shoolini University fee components: refundable and non-refundable. To confirm their seat, candidates who made through the shortlist via the Shoolini University admission process must pay the course fee.

course_faqs.question: Does Shoolini University offer 100% waiver to B.Tech students?
course_faqs.answer: Shoolini University provides 100% waiver under Need-cum-Merit Scholarship to BTech or UG students. Students with a minimum of 80% marks in the preceding degree (Class 12) are eligible for 100% scholarship. However, the waiver is applicable only on the tuition fee and candidates have to pay the other fee component.

course_faqs.question: How much B.Tech fee is waived off in 50% scholarship at Shoolini University?
course_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech ranges between INR 5.1 lakh and INR 12.8 lakh. Students can get a 50% waiver under Merit or Need-cum-Merit Scholarships offered by the university. Students need to pay a fee of INR 2.55 Lacs and INR 6.40 Lacs after 50% waiver in the tuition fee. Besides, aspirants also need to pay the other fee components.

course_faqs.question: Is Shoolini University good for BTech?
course_faqs.answer: Shoolini University can be a good option for BTech as it provides scholarships which can waive off tuition fee. The total tuition fee of the BTech programme at Shoolini University ranges between INR 5.1 Lacs - INR 9.4 lakh. The median package secured after the completion of the course was INR 4.28 LPA. Considering the total tuition fee and the package secured this seems to be a good return on the investment. The fee is sourced from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of Shoolini University BTech course?
overview_faqs.answer: Hi, The total tuition fee for BTech at Shoolini University is between Rs 5.1 Lacs and Rs 9.4 lakh. This fee amount is for the different three-year lateral entry or four-year courses offered by the university. The BTech course at Shoolini University offers BTech in different streams, for example, BTech in CSE or BTech in Biotechnology Research. Hence, the fee mentioned is also for different courses offered by the university. Apart from the tuition fee, the students who decide to live in the hostel are required to pay the annual hostel charges which are approximately INR 4.4 Lacs and a one-time admission fee is applicable for all the students. I hope this answer is helpful to you.

overview_faqs.question: Is BCom three years course at Shooolini University?
overview_faqs.answer: Shoolini University BCom course is a four years honors degree course that has a total of eight semesters. The University also offers an international certification along with the BCom (Hons) degree. Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA-UK) certification is a global qualification in Finance and Accounting offered by a UK body. Candidates can only pursue BCom with ACCA while doing BCom (Hons) at Shoolini University.

review_summary.college_name: Shoolini University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A place to relax and win in life.

content.Placements: It provides an easy package at our university. They confirm 100 percent placement offers. The lowest package starts from 3 LPA but can go up to 18 LPA. The highest package is 45 LPA, and it is none other than a brilliant student of Shoolini University. Our university provides us with a space to work and win.
content.Infrastructure: It has a very beautiful campus, no honking, no noise, it's all greenery, and peaceful with amazing place to sit and relax. Our hostel is so clean with amazing people working to keep it peaceful, with different events like marathon and yoga sessions in the morning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The university location is great and peaceful.

content.Placements: 85 percent of students are placed. The highest package offered is 24 LPA, the lowest package offered is 1 LPA, and the average package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiters are Accenture, Dell, HCL, and many more. 70 percent in AWS, Accenture, Hitachi, and ITC are some of the companies. Roles offered are senior software developer, General Manager, and AI developer.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and library are available. Top-notch classrooms, electricity, a purified water project, and research labs. Facilities in the hostel are good. The quality of food is nice, and a medical facility is available 24 hours a day at the nearby hospital. Sports and games are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, updated curriculum, and more. Come if a remote location is not a problem.

content.Placements: The real data is that about 90% of all students got placed. The top package this year is about 12 LPA, the lowest is about 3 LPA, and the average package is about 6 LPA. There are no very big names among the companies (on-campus), and the top ones are TCS & Infosys. Most students got internships, including many completing their 1st year. Top roles are related to SDE, Data Science, and AI.
content.Infrastructure: The library is pretty big and useful, with a huge set of books. Wi-Fi is amazing (hostel excluded). You'll find exceptions even on roads while you are walking on campus. Classrooms & labs for this course in the AI building are unarguably one of the best in the country, not exaggerating. Hostel rooms are comparable to the ones from dorms of international universities, with the option of attached washrooms too. Even common washrooms are clean all the time as they're thoroughly cleaned several times throughout the day. Mess is pretty, and food is decent too. We have to pay extra for non-vegetarian food.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Full Stack Developer - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are knowledgeable and supportive, always willing to help beyond expectations.

content.Placements: The program offers decent placement opportunities with reputed companies visiting the campus. While core jobs are available students with good internships have a better chance. The placement cell is supportive but its outreach could improve. This time I understand that my college is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course is well-developed with spacious classrooms, projectors and access to labs with updated equipment. The hostel is clean and secure offering basic amenities like Wi-Fi and laundry though food quality can improve.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Excellent college and satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: Placement is 100%. The college provides good placement facilities and internship programs, including the opportunity to gain experience and knowledge. Different types of top companies appear for placement in different areas of expertise. In the agriculture course, different companies have different approaches.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course is quite good. It provides well-furnished smart classes with projectors. Different labs according to subjects are provided with the necessary chemicals and equipment. The different equipment is provided for good knowledge.

admission_overview.college_name: Shoolini University Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: Shoolini University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shoolini University is accepts admission on a merit basis and an entrance basis.The university admits nationally level exams such as SAT India, JEE Main, CUET, CAT, MAT, etc.Additionally, Shoolini offers an entrance exam, known as SU-SAT, in selectcourses.With more than 180 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in fields such as Science, Engineering, Management, Commerce, Pharmacy, and Law,among others, students are offered a great choice.Lateral entry admissions and Summit Research Program courses in Engineering are also permitted in the university.

The University offers various courses in the fields ofEngineering, Law and Science etc. Students seeking admission must meet the course specific eligibility and selection conditions. However, the university also offers a BTech Lateral Entry course. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularShoolini University courses.
CUET UG/ SU-SAT/JEE Main/SAT India+ Faculty Interaction
The admission process at Shoolini University consists of multiple s, which are as follows.

1. Shoolini University Application Process 2025Candidates are required to apply online for all courses offered by Shoolini University. During the application, an application fee needs to be paid. For BBA, BCom, and MBA courses. Students can check the detailed Shoolini University fee structure here.

2. Selection RoundsShoolini University admits students based on various entrance exam scores such as CLAT, GMAT, MAT, etc., for various course admission such as BA LLB, BBA, BDes among others. For UG and PG courses, the selection criteria for PhD course admission is based on a multiple-choice entrance test and assessment of research aptitude through concept notes & faculty interaction.

3. Merit List & CounsellingBased on the candidates' performance in the selection rounds, the university prepares a merit list. Those who find their names on the merit list are invited to the counselling round. During this stage, candidates need to confirm their admission by paying the required fee.
Check out more on Shoolini University in the below video.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission into Shoolini University BTech course?
faqs.answer: For Shoolini University BTech admission students must have passed Class 12 with any of the two following subjects: Physics/ Mathematics/ Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship with minimum 60%.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BTech course at Shoolini University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the four-year BTech programme at Shoolini University ranges between INR 5.1 Lakhs - INR 12.8 Lakhs. The candidate also have to pay hostel and one-time fee. Check the table below fo rvlarity:Fee ComponentAmountHostel feeINR 4.40 lakhOne-timeINR 30,000The fee mentioned here is taken from the official sources. Candidates are requested to visit the official website for more detailed fee structure.

faqs.question: Does Shoolini University accept any entrance exam for admission to BTech courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, Shoolini University accepts JEE Main, CUET UG or SAT score for BTech admission. The university conducts SU-SAT for aspirants who have not appeared for any of the accepted entrance exams. After completion of the selection rounds, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. The shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Where can a candidate find Shoolini University cut off?
faqs.answer: National admission exams such as SAT India, JEE Main, CUET, CAT, MAT, and so on are accepted by Shoolini University. For particular courses, Shoolini University administers the SU-SAT, its own entrance exam. Applicants can view the merit list and cut-off information on the college's official website. Additionally, aspirants can follow Shiksha for any updates and information about the Shoolini University cutoff marks. Candidates must meet the requirements for the MBA programme in MAT, CAT, ALLIAN

faqs.question: Can we join Shoolini University directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can apply directly to Shoolini University by following the application procedures. Admission at Shoolini University is decided by both entrance as well as merit. National-level entrance tests such as the SAT India, JEE Main, CUET, CAT, MAT, and so on are accepted by the university. For particular courses, Shoolini University administers the SU-SAT, its own entrance exam. More than 180 UG, PG, and PhD courses in a variety of subjects are available at the institution, including engineering, management, commerce, pharmacy, law, and more. For the engineering branch, it also provides summit research courses and lateral entrance admissions. In addition, the Shoolini University Centre for Distance and Online Education (SCDOE) provides BBA, BCom (Hons), and other courses.

placement_report.college_name: Shoolini University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Shoolini University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Shoolini University has a placement cell responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The University invites companies of various sectors to conduct the Campus interview process at the University premises. The placed students also get the opportunity to do their final project in the placed company as interns with a stipend at this phase. After successful completion of the internship, the students can get full-time employment.

Shoolini University concluded the placements for the Class of 2024 with 100% placements of BTech, MBA, Journalism and Hotel Management courses. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Shoolini University placements in 2024 stood at INR 42 LPA. Further, over 500 recruiters participated and presented over 5,000 jobs to the students of the 2024 batch . The top recruiters who participated during the recent placement drives at Shoolini University included IBM, CITRIX, Cognizant, Polaris, LG Electronics, Genpact, Hughes Systique, Tata Hitachi, Code Brew, Net Solution, Nestle, etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at the Shoolini University?
faqs.answer: The Shoolini University average package offered during the 2024 placement drive is yet to be released on the official website. Meanwhile, check out the highest package offered in 2024 placements: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Highest package INR 42 LPA

faqs.question: How strong is the Shoolini University career services department?
faqs.answer: The Shoolini University placement cell manages both placement and internship possibilities for students, as well as coordinates with organisations to arrange campus interviews. It is responsible to assist the students with interview preparation, writing tips for cover letter and portfolio design. It is also the role of Shoolini University’s career services department to organise live projects, industry visits, seminars, workshops, and guest lectures for students.

faqs.question: How many offers were made during the recent Shoolini University placement?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, the participating recruiters offered over 5,000 job offers students of the batch 2024 during Shoolini University placements 2024. The total number of offers made during Shoolini University placements 2024 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Total placements 5,000+

faqs.question: Is there any provision to pay fee in installments?
faqs.answer: For the convenience of students, the fee is paid in two instalments per year at Shoolini University. Students can check the table below to know some of course-wise total tuition fee: Course Total Tuition Fee BTech INR 5.1 lakh-INR 12.8 lakh MBA INR 4.7 lakh-INR 9.4 lakh BPharm INR 5.2 lakh-INR 6.9 lakh BCA INR 4 lakh BBA INR 75,000-INR 7.4 lakh Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA course at Shoolini University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of MBA at Shoolini University is INR 5.95 Lacs as per the unofficial source. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The fee mentioned above only includes the total cost of tuition and does not include the hostel fee or mess fee.

highlights.description: Shoolini University is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #69 in the University category, and #44 under Pharmacy. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #587 to Shoolini University. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Shoolini University rankings.

nirf.description:
Shoolini University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Shoolini University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, Shoolini University fell 12 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Shoolini University climbed 1 rank to #69 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Shoolini University fell 9 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Shoolini University fell 14 ranks to #44 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Tabulated below are the rankings and categories from various ranking bodies:

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, Shoolini University has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2026, Shoolini University climbed 84 ranks to #503 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Shoolini University climbed 9 ranks to #159 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Shoolini University climbed 4 ranks to #23 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

reviews.review_heading: A place to relax and win in life.
reviews.review_text: It has a very beautiful campus, no honking, no noise, it's all greenery, and peaceful with amazing place to sit and relax. Our hostel is so clean with amazing people working to keep it peaceful, with different events like marathon and yoga sessions in the morning.

reviews.review_heading: The university location is great and peaceful.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and library are available. Top-notch classrooms, electricity, a purified water project, and research labs. Facilities in the hostel are good. The quality of food is nice, and a medical facility is available 24 hours a day at the nearby hospital. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, updated curriculum, and more. Come if a remote location is not a problem.
reviews.review_text: The library is pretty big and useful, with a huge set of books. Wi-Fi is amazing (hostel excluded). You'll find exceptions even on roads while you are walking on campus. Classrooms & labs for this course in the AI building are unarguably one of the best in the country, not exaggerating. Hostel rooms are comparable to the ones from dorms of international universities, with the option of attached washrooms too. Even common washrooms are clean all the time as they're thoroughly cleaned several time...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are knowledgeable and supportive, always willing to help beyond expectations.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is well-developed with spacious classrooms, projectors and access to labs with updated equipment. The hostel is clean and secure offering basic amenities like Wi-Fi and laundry though food quality can improve.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college and satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is quite good. It provides well-furnished smart classes with projectors. Different labs according to subjects are provided with the necessary chemicals and equipment. The different equipment is provided for good knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: This university is good for your overall development.
reviews.review_text: The college has modern infrastructure, and the hostels provide very good services, especially in my hostel, for village students. The boys' hostel is located off the campus, and the girls' hostel is on the campus. There is 24 hour Wi-Fi service available. The labs are good, and there is an Apple lab in the AI block.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and my college offers a great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and well-equipped labs that support practical learning. The department also has access to a good library with relevant reference materials and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms and regular maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: It has great labs for research and a peaceful campus.
reviews.review_text: The campus is well-equipped with different facilities. For food technology students, there are advanced labs for research. The university itself carries many patients which helps a lot in research programs. It has modern classrooms with Wi-Fi ensuring a seamless learning experience. The hostel is good here. There is an indoor cafe built in girls' hostel. It has different games and modernized infrastructure which make it feel like our second home.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available are good. The washrooms are clean, classrooms are clean and spacious, and there is good Wi-Fi connectivity. The library is also amazing, open 24/7, 365 days a year, which is the best part. The hostel is also good, with good rooms, good food, and medical facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus and reliable faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very bad. Labs are not that bad. Quality of food is okay-okay. Some of the classrooms are very well-facilitated, and some are good ones. Good medical facilities are available. From time to time, game matches are held, and there is a sports complex with a gym also included in it.

reviews.review_heading: Strong digital marketing program with great placement and scenic campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department has smart classrooms and high-speed Wi-Fi. The infrastructure is modern and well-maintained. Hostel is clean. The mess food is decent with a mix of dishes, and the mess offered good snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports like basketball, volleyball, badminton, and gym are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: The environment and atmosphere here are really good.
reviews.review_text: Well, I would say that the facilities are fairly good and good Wi-Fi speed, and libraries (study rooms) are there. Overall the facilities are good and the hostel is near campus. It is a very big advantage for me at the very least. Also, there are proper labs in my department.

reviews.review_heading: After so many days of worrying, I finally found my fit.
reviews.review_text: My department is very well equipped with laboratories which are really important for my course. Hostel facilities are at par, especially with the dead stories that I have heard from my older cousins. The hostel has been a relief. Moreover, they do listen. Feedback is taken often and acted upon.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the university for now.
reviews.review_text: They have high-speed Wi-Fi everywhere but in the AI block they have a speed of around 200 Mbps. The food is average and their cleanliness is maintained throughout the university. All the equipment is present in the labs and maintained by the university.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, they do provide placements, and everything is amazing.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. I didn't opt for a hostel, so I don't know about it. There are clean washrooms, a 24/7 library, and good Wi-Fi. The classrooms are clean, and the food is average. Medical facilities are available, which are good. There are sports and games, a stadium, a basketball court, and a gym to stay fit.

The quality of the food served in the hostel, mess and canteen are excellent.

Teachers really focus on increasing our knowledge, carry out various classroom activities like quiz and presentations that I think no other University prefers.
This course is relevant to the curriculum and makes students ready for the industry.

review_content.Placements: B.Pharma is a 4 year course. GMCK has seperate college for pharmacy. You get to work at medical college or any other pharmacy for 2 month as placement. Government and private placements will be available after completion of the course. You can pursue teaching after completing MPHARM.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is being upgraded to high end. It is a free Wi-Fi campus with e library for reference studies. Pharmacy college has won various cups for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is average, but we have good faculty and complete freedom.

review_content.Placements: Passed out students with decent knowledge will be able to accomplish many things. Students after doing PG can get a decent salary and a well-settled job. Hard work and determination are required to live a settled and peaceful life. Overall, the placements are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The campus is huge, but the maintenance is very poor. Lots of space can be utilised on the campus for various developments. Maintaining the campus will do a lot. The hostel is very poor, and the cleanliness is also poor.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our campus is good to study MBBS.

review_content.Placements: I am an MBBS student of the 2020 batch. I have 4 more years to get passed out. After the MBBS course, many of the seniors from our college get PG admissions, and most of them are practicing as private practitioners. Many of them get government postings. After the MBBS course, these are the options in front of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of this campus and the hostels are good. Even though it is an old institution that is taken up by the government recently many new infrastructural facilities are being implemented in the recent time. Classrooms are well organized and digital. The hostels are good, and facilities for sports are good. A sports complex and synthetic track are being made. Courts for all types of games are available.

review_summary.college_name: Pariyaram Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely an underrated gem.

content.Placements: We were starting with packages of 20–30k stipend at the end of our course as an internship or doing a house surgency, and we are supposed to do our PG after it. Our college has one of the best cardiology departments across India. Most of the students, after passing out from MBBS, prepare for the NEET PG examination.
content.Infrastructure: As the hospital is pretty old and government-run, the buildings are pretty old but provide a calm and peaceful environment for study. We have a well-equipped AC library and hall, an open auditorium, and labs for every course. We have a very spacious centralized AC study hall. The hostel is located at a minimum distance of 500 meters across the top of a hill. The hostel meets all our basic requirements, such as a well-equipped study hall and gym.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities. Absolutely delighted to study here.

content.Placements: B.Pharma is a 4 year course. GMCK has seperate college for pharmacy. You get to work at medical college or any other pharmacy for 2 month as placement. Government and private placements will be available after completion of the course. You can pursue teaching after completing MPHARM.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is being upgraded to high end. It is a free Wi-Fi campus with e library for reference studies. Pharmacy college has basketball court, football court and volleyball court. Mess option is available here. Medical college has the largest medical facilities. Pharmacy college has won various cups for sports.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is average, but we have good faculty and complete freedom.

content.Placements: Passed out students with decent knowledge will be able to accomplish many things. Students after doing PG can get a decent salary and a well-settled job. Hard work and determination are required to live a settled and peaceful life. Overall, the placements are good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The campus is huge, but the maintenance is very poor. Lots of space can be utilised on the campus for various developments. Maintaining the campus will do a lot. The hostel is very poor, and the cleanliness is also poor.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our campus is good to study MBBS.

content.Placements: I am an MBBS student of the 2020 batch. I have 4 more years to get passed out. After the MBBS course, many of the seniors from our college get PG admissions, and most of them are practicing as private practitioners. Many of them get government postings. After the MBBS course, these are the options in front of students.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of this campus and the hostels are good. Even though it is an old institution that is taken up by the government recently many new infrastructural facilities are being implemented in the recent time. Classrooms are well organized and digital. The hostels are good, and facilities for sports are good. A sports complex and synthetic track are being made. Courts for all types of games are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Not bad. Could have been better.

content.Placements: This is MBBS. So things don't work like campus placement and recruitment as for B.Tech. So these questions are not valid. Everybody will be having the basic MBBS degree after completing the basic degree. Rest all depends on your post graduation and higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are not airconditioned. Library is good. Food is okay. Sports and games labs are okay. Mess food and canteen food is not bad. Could have been better definitely. Campus and the surroundings need to be developed more. Overall not bad.

Government Medical College, Pariyaram NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 11650 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Pariyaram MBBS cutoff 2025 was 11650 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 11877 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College, Pariyaram NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 17825. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College, Pariyaram MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 17825.

For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff was 1272, with DM being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Government Medical College, Pariyaram DM cutoff 2025 was 1272 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 1272, DM in Cardiology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The campus is huge, but the maintenance is very poor. Lots of space can be utilised on the campus for various developments. Maintaining the campus will do a lot. The hostel is very poor, and the cleanliness is also poor.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is good to study MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of this campus and the hostels are good. Even though it is an old institution that is taken up by the government recently many new infrastructural facilities are being implemented in the recent time. Classrooms are well organized and digital. The hostels are good, and facilities for sports are good. A sports complex and synthetic track are being made. Courts for all types of games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Not bad. Could have been better.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are not airconditioned. Library is good. Food is okay. Sports and games labs are okay. Mess food and canteen food is not bad. Could have been better definitely. Campus and the surroundings need to be developed more. Overall not bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members, strict rules, average placements, and good campus.

content.Placements: Mostly 80 students get placement. After MBBS, salary varies from Rs 50,000 to 1 lakh in cities like Dehli. We can also pursue some research through this college. Mostly all of us get internship offers. There are about 250 students in my own batch 2023, and the students-teachers ratio is good.
content.Infrastructure: There are 4-5 hostels for boys and girls. A big campus of about 50 acres. There is a good facilitated hospital with an average OPD of 1000-1500. There is an auditorium for cultural events. There are 2 canteens for day schedule and 24-hour water facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My Rmch as a medical School.

content.Placements: There are no placements in my college because it is a private medical college. Everything depends on your knowledge, skills, experience, and family background. The college plays no role in this.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very poor as it is quite old. The hostels are also in very poor condition with improper cleaning, and the hostel warden does not pay attention to our complaints.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are very good except for the principal of the college, who is not effective. Anyone who earns 2 Lacs monthly could do better for the students. However, all other teachers are very good in teaching and other activities. Exams are also fair enough.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: RMCH bareilly complete review.

content.Placements: Students who passed RMCH with an MBBS degree are eligible to apply to any private or government-run hospital for junior residents and medical officer EMO posts. Most students after MBBS opt for PG, MD, and MS degrees. Students, after passing MBBS, do a mandatory 1-year internship in the college itself .
content.Infrastructure: RMCH provides many courses, like MBBS, MD, and MS, in different branches like general medicine, general surgery, ophthalmology, ENT, orthopedics, pediatrics, etc. Lecture theaters have centralized air conditioning and projector screens. A full-AC library with space for 200 students at a time is there .

individual_reviews.title: A good college academically but lacks a little in infrastructure.

content.Placements: In MBBS, there is no such thing as placements. After completing MBBS, we have options depending on future plans for different people. First, we can give the NEET PG exam or practice as an MBBS doctor in some government or private hospital. Every year, 150 students do internships in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a hospital of its own, which has every department like surgery, medicine, obg, ophtho, ent, radio, etc. with all facilities of treatment and surgery. The classrooms are well air-conditioned with wooden desks. Proper labs are there for anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, and microbiology. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty and facilities.

content.Placements: Students were eligible for placements from the 8th semester. The salary offered was Rs.60,000 to Rs.90,000 per year. Around 60-70% of students got placements in our college and this is increasing every year.
content.Infrastructure: There were 2 buildings for hostels, each consisting of 300 good rooms. Two-seater rooms were provided to students that consisted of lights, electric boards, beds, study tables, and chairs. The quality of the mess food was the best. It had a menu card. Registration for the hostel was done during academic admission. Students had to fill out the form, and the stamp of the hostel warden was mandatory. After that, students submit the fee as a demand draft.
