reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is available in our college. Hostel facilities are excellent. The mess facility is available in our hostel. The food served in the mess is good and they provide a variety of food items daily. The hostel fee is 1.5 LPA. Our hostel rooms are spacious. Around 3 students can accommodate in every single room. A personal cupboard is provided for students to store their important things and a single bed for each student.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, excellent faculty, good campus environment and sufficient patient flow.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quite huge, with a basketball court, badminton court, cricket and football ground. The college has a central library, and the books are also available for reference purposes. One can visit the canteen during the lunch break. The hostels don't have Wi-Fi, but Wi-Fi boosters are available. The classrooms or lecture theatres are quite large and with air-conditioning facilities. The clinical labs have good equipment in working condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rohilkhand Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is satisfactory but not worth the money. Our college has a cricket ground, football ground, badminton court, table tennis and also a garden to walk. There is also a separate building for 1st-year boys to avoid ragging. Overall, our college is worth living.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges at high NEET rank.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is satisfactory. Our college has a cricket ground, football ground, badminton court, table tennis and also a garden to walk. Classrooms are also fully air-conditioned, and there is a college library which gives students a kind of overall development.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as it has all the resources needed in a medical college.
reviews.review_text: Students would surely like our college infrastructure. All facilities are provided by the college. There is a cricket ground, football and basketball court and two parks on the campus. There is a Shiv temple inside our college campus, and a children park is also available here.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college. You will enjoy 5 and a half years of your hostel life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is satisfactory but do not worth the money. Our college has a cricket ground, football ground, badminton court, table tennis and also a garden to walk. There is also a separate building for 1st-year boys to avoid ragging. Overall, our college is worthy of living.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides fully air-conditioned classrooms and best infrastructure. Our college has a library which has all sorts of books and manuals. Fresh journals are introduced in it every month. There is an auditorium which has a facility for all sorts of indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: In college and hostels, the students get access to the Wi-Fi, which is of high-speed and free. The classrooms were soo big and can accomodate at least around 300 people easily. There was a central library in the college campus which contains almost all the books for the students. You can issue the books by showing your library card. College also has practical labs where we do practicals. The hostel was of good infrastructure with many facilities like Wi-Fi access, hygiene, electricity. The food ...

reviews.review_heading: Campus is good, but very bad fine system if you do any activity you have to pay a fine.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only available in library. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are average, not too good and not too bad. The quality of life is very bad in the campus. The food available in mess is full of insects and too much oil in which you can swim. Medical facilities, as well as sports facilities, are good. Cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, and many parks are available on-campus.

review_summary.college_name: Government College of Pharmacy, Amravati Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmacognosy - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: In college, the TCS campus is organized for the 4th year appearing students. They select students through an interview, and the selected students have an approximate salary of Rs. 14,000 per month. This is the starting salary for those students. For QA students, the college provides an internship for 6 months for their research work. As for GPAT students, AICTE already offers a stipend, but the internship is unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: I didn't opt for a hostel. My college doesn't have any hostel facilities because of the very small campus. There is no space for a hostel building. All the students live in nearby houses on rent and have a mess for eating. The college has only one small canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Government College of Pharmacy, Amravati.

content.Placements: There is no significant availability of jobs after pursuing this course. Students generally prefer higher education after this course. Pharmacist, drug inspector, and chemist are some of the roles offered after pursuing a B.Pharmacy. The average salary if you get a job is about 1.8LPA to 3.6LPA.
content.Infrastructure: GCOPA is composed of labs with advanced instruments where we can perform various pharmaceutical experiments. However, the classrooms are not fully air-conditioned but still have proper ventilation. The library has a variety of books and is a place where students can study peacefully.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for a government tag and self studies.

content.Placements: The next passout batch will be in 2026. In the previous two years, no companies came for placement, and most students pursued higher education and off-campus employment. The college provides internships in good companies and in industry. The students under Inamdar Maam got good experience.
content.Infrastructure: The college does not have any hostels due to its small campus size, but some private hostels, especially for girls, and rooms are available in the surrounding area. The college provides WIFI on campus, but access is limited to 35 mb. The college has one library with lots of books.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a great pharmacy college in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: Our college is the top-ranked college in Maharashtra. There are only four government colleges. Top recruiting companies visit our campus. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Almost 95% of students are placed.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is not available. Our college provides good infrastructure. Sports like table tennis, carrom, and other indoor and outdoor games are arranged. The college has an excellent library. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college to study in.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies like TCS, etc., visit our campus. Most students try to crack GPAT and go for higher studies. Many students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi is available only for teachers. There is a Wi-Fi router for students, but it has a 25 MB limit. Our classrooms are huge, each with a capacity of 75 seats. The hostel is not available. For girls, there are 3 to 4 private hostels and 2 government hostels.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are excellent, caring, and helpful. The teaching quality is good. Some teachers teach well. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. The semester exams are easy. The passing marks are 75.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at AISSMS College of Pharmacy during placements?

faqs.answer: A:    AISSMS College of Pharmacy, Pune offers placement opportunities with a range of companies recruiting graduates. Top recruiters include pharmaceutical companies, such as Glenmark, Lupin, Sanofi, Sunpharma, and Novartis, along with IT companies, such as TCS and Cognizant. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the AISSMS College of Pharmacy offers M.Pharma. The fees for AISSMS College of Pharmacy courses range between INR 4,34,782 to 4,62,608.

faqs.answer: A:    AISSMS College of Pharmacy is a good institution for B.Pharma, M.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at AISSMS College of Pharmacy are Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology, Quality Assurance .
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by AISSMS College of Pharmacy?

review_content.General: There are well-equipped labs with all instruments needed for pharmaceutical research. There are only 4 classrooms with good ventilation. There is a pilot plant that has all instruments used in industry. There are 4 labs on each floor. There is an NSS committee and an APGA committee for all extracurricular activities. The college allows us to play sports in competition. The college gives exposure by sending us to various conferences and giving us the chance to represent our research projects. There is only one canteen on the campus. It is good, but not worth it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college and had a great time in college.

review_content.Placements: For placement, one should have a 6.0 GPA or above. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest is 15 LPA. Companies like Sanofi Pharma Ltd participate, with QC and QA roles mostly offered. The college infrastructure is great; labs are well-equipped with necessary equipment and chemicals for tests. review_summary.college_name: AISSMS College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: You can give other competitive exams at other universities and pay the exact same fee for 4.

content.Placements: Above 30 students got placed. The lowest package is 1.56 LPA, and the highest salary is above 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The companies our college recruits are Cipla, Sun Pharma, Lupin, Glenmark, Emcure, etc. Internships are like 200 or above. Talking about roles offered in pharmacy R and D, F&D, marketing, cosmetics production, and research.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very spacious, with a great Wi-Fi connection and projector. Projectors are of good quality with a light generator. Labs have all of the required materials for practicals. Library is also worthy. College canteen is not very good but okay.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the teaching of faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: There are no placements through college for the B.Pharma level, but teachers and the placement committee help us get jobs by giving references in the industry. The college does not offer internships, and students have to search for internships on their own. The college just supports by giving documentation needed for internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-equipped labs with all instruments needed for pharmaceutical research. There are only 4 classrooms with good ventilation. There is a pilot plant that has all instruments used in industry. There are 4 labs on each floor. There is an NSS committee and an APGA committee for all extracurricular activities. The college allows us to play sports in competition. The college gives exposure by sending us to various conferences and giving us the chance to represent our research projects. There is only one canteen on the campus. It is good, but not worth it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college and had a great time in college.

content.Placements: For placement, one should have a 6.0 GPA or above. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest is 15 LPA. Companies like Sanofi Pharma Ltd participate, with QC and QA roles mostly offered. The college infrastructure is great; labs are well-equipped with necessary equipment and chemicals for tests. We also worked on in-house projects.
content.Infrastructure: Spacious classrooms, labs, library, ground, canteen, common area separate for boys and girls, etc. are there. We had our own cricket, volleyball, basketball, athletics, Kabaddi, football, badminton and many other teams. We also won intercollege competitions in these years.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very well organized and awesome, with facilities including wifi at every floor, a library that has access to various paid journals and databases for research studies, well-equipped labs and classrooms and also filtered water availability at every floor . individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Unveiling My Campus Life - Samiksha Jawarkar

content.Placements: There is a training and placement cell that organizes various sessions, such as personality development sessions by the Naandi organization for girls. This has a valuable impact on improving personality and skills. Around 50% of students are placed, while the rest are pursuing courses related to pharmacy. The highest package for students after higher education is around 4.5 lakhs. The top companies that visited our college include Dr. Reddy, Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, and others. Our college organizes various programs related to pharmaceutical science, including a VALUE ADDED ADVANCED INSTRUMENTATION course that provides certificates for each seminar, webinar, and personality development session.

reviews.review_text: Our college is well-known for the Master of Pharmacy program, which ranks among the top 5 colleges in Pune for M Pharm. We have excellent facilities for students for research purposes along with practical skills. As a Pharmacology student, our college provides various instruments for research and has an Animal House that includes various kinds of experimental animals. Every classroom is equipped with a digital projector, and free Wi-Fi is available. Our college offers a variety of books, includi...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best location, faculty, and staff members .
reviews.review_text: AISSMS College of Pharmacy is located in Shivaji Nagar near the metro station, which makes it very easy for people from longer distances to travel. Infrastructure is the best, as it has well-designed laboratories for each subject and departments are distributed separately.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff with good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure available in the department, including a good library, classrooms and labs with limited connectivity. Wi-Fi overall is not good. Canteens, sports and games are well-suited for sports; that's enough for a good education institute for students .

reviews.review_heading: AISSMS college of pharmacy is one of the best colleges for the pharmacy course.
reviews.review_text: The college does not provide any medical facilities. The college has Wi-Fi labs and a library. The labs do not have adequate glassware and chemicals for the 120 students. The food quality is not good for health. Sports and game events are held.

reviews.review_heading: The diary of AISSMS COP PUNE.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of college was updated and renewed in 2024. There are all the necessary labs for all subjects and all the necessary equipments. There is Wi-Fi on campus routers on each floor, separate from the library.
There is an animal house for college and there is also a pilot plant in college that has industry machines to show some basic working.

reviews.review_heading: AISSMS College of Pharmacy is one of the good colleges in Pune.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with smart screens and projectors. The classes have benches, though a few are broken. Labs have working equipment and good-quality chemicals. There is no Wi-Fi yet. The library is equipped with textbooks, research papers, and reference books, though personal books are not allowed in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Bundle of experiences. AISSMS College of Pharmacy
reviews.review_text: Facilities available to students are good. A library is provided to the students, which contains a variety of books, journals, pharmacopoeias, and research papers for reference. Also, wi-fi facilities are provided. Classrooms are also cleaned for study.

reviews.review_heading: I wish students got more industrial knowledge than theory, as it would help them in their future.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully equipped with projectors, Wi-Fi in the library and computer room and also in practical labs with a lift and a CCTV camera. The food in the canteen is of moderate quality but palatable; it maintains all the hygiene and the overall taste is good. The college is equipped with first-aid and medical facilities. Every year, the college conducts a sports week called 'Ranangan' which is very sporting and celebrated and enjoyed by all the students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the crowd, staff, and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for different subjects and also a library, auditorium, and classrooms. Labs are also well-equipped. The college doesn't have any hostels. The B.Pharma course has 8 semesters; each semester has different subjects that have both theory and practical exams.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. There is no private hostel at the college. The canteen facility is okay. Labs are well maintained and equipped, but they must develop more, especially in management. Library facilities and service are the best. Overall, the college supports in-house projects and supports students in using laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: Review of M.Pharma pharmaceutical Chemistry.
reviews.review_text: All books related to pharmacy are available; a book list is available for searching for books. Classrooms have amenities like projectors, and an internet lab is also available. The campus has basketball, badminton and cricket pitches, and various intercollegiate tournaments are organized for students. Also, indoor games like arm wrestling, carrom, chess, table tennis, etc. are played during sports week. The college has an NSS event with 20 students. Yes, we have our own hostel, and the food is g...

reviews_list.review_title: This college is one of the best colleges for physiotherapy.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. It all depends on individual skills. You have to work a little hard to get good placements. You have to maintain good discipline and knowledge about your course so that you can get easily placed in good hospitals. It depends on your ability to treat patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There is a hospital for therapy patients. Classrooms, canteen and library are avialable for students. Sports and medical facilities are also provided. Hostels and mess are available for girls. We have Wi-Fi labs and every small thing that is needed by students is available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It provides supportive faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There is no dearth of placements in this college, in the final year some private hospitals and NGOs come to offer internships, and when the students perform well, it also gets a final place. If students will study well and learn practical skills, because this is a professional and skill building course as well then they will get placements, even if it is not there, students will do very well in it. The average salary offered ranges from Rs 25,000 per month - Rs 35,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The departments are not very great, but there is a lot for studies. The laboratories are also fine, it looks old but there is no shortage of modern equipment. There are only girls' hostels here, and I have heard that the hostel facilities are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Very satisfied by college.

review_content.Placements: I completed my Bachelors in 2019 in BPT course. 55 students were placed at that time. Different hospitals and clinics come for recruitment based on interviews. The highest package you can get is 40,000 per month for freshers and the lowest package to be 25,000 per month. College arranges internship for the students in different hospitals and outside Delhi too which is referred as rural posting.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that good. Wi-Fi is very slow, classes have air conditioners. Mess is okay, food is edible. Medical facilities are on point. The college don't have a ground to play sports so the sports part is missing. The college has a badminton court and a very small basketball court just to practice the shots.

review_summary.college_name: Pt. Deendayal Upadhyaya National Institute for Persons with Physical Disabilities Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Pt. Deendayal Upadhyaya National Institute for Persons with Physical Disabilities.

content.Placements: Hello. I have taken admission in this college this year. I am a BPT first-year student. There are a total of 120 students in my class. In my college, OT placements are really good in comparison to PT. This information is mainly given by seniors. I will inform you of the rest when I start my internship. The internship duration is 6 months. But ward duty starts from the 3rd year onwards. This college is one of the top colleges in India. The campus is really small, but the metro and bus stop are nearby, so it's convenient.
content.Infrastructure: Our class has a projector, and a speaker. So, we study from PPTs. Anatomy is sometimes taught practically when the bone study is ongoing. Every bench is provided one bone for practice. Students can even issue bones through the anatomy lab and sit and study there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best college of Physiotherapy in India, great college life and good placements.

content.Placements: Almost 100% students are offered placements after the course. The highest package is 35k while the lowest is 10k. The average packages are around 20-25k. Top recruiting companies are Osteopath and Apolo. All students are offered 6 months internship. Top roles for BPT students- Physiotherapists, Sports Rehabilitation, Lecturer.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi, library, gym available. Large classrooms and separate labs for anatomy and physiology. Cadaver available for practical. There is a badminton and cricket court on the backside of college. The hostel is hygienic, secure and well maintained. Mess is clean and the food is good. The cooks follow a certain timetable. Canteen food is low priced. Like tea is Rs. 10. Chole bathure is a must.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is one of the best colleges for physiotherapy.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. It all depends on individual skills. You have to work a little hard to get good placements. You have to maintain good discipline and knowledge about your course so that you can get easily placed in good hospitals. It depends on your ability to treat patients.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There is a hospital for therapy patients. Classrooms, canteen and library are avialable for students. Sports and medical facilities are also provided. Hostels and mess are available for girls. We have Wi-Fi labs and every small thing that is needed by students is available here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It provides supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: There is no dearth of placements in this college, in the final year some private hospitals and NGOs come to offer internships, and when the students perform well, it also gets a final place. If students will study well and learn practical skills, because this is a professional and skill building course as well then they will get placements, even if it is not there, students will do very well in it. The average salary offered ranges from Rs 25,000 per month - Rs 35,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The departments are not very great, but there is a lot for studies. The laboratories are also fine, it looks old but there is no shortage of modern equipment. There are only girls' hostels here, and I have heard that the hostel facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied by college.

content.Placements: I completed my Bachelors in 2019 in BPT course. 55 students were placed at that time. Different hospitals and clinics come for recruitment based on interviews. The highest package you can get is 40,000 per month for freshers and the lowest package to be 25,000 per month. College arranges internship for the students in different hospitals and outside Delhi too which is referred as rural posting.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that good. Wi-Fi is very slow, classes have air conditioners. Mess is okay, food is edible. Medical facilities are on point. The college don't have a ground to play sports so the sports part is missing. The college has a badminton court and a very small basketball court just to practice the shots.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Zoology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I was satisfied with the placement facility in 2024 and the good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got placed, with an average package offered between 4-8 LPA. Students got internships in different colleges and research institutes.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available throughout the university, including classrooms, labs, library, hostel, and everywhere on campus (24/7). Facilities were quite good in the hostel, and the food quality was good in both the mess and canteen. Different types of sports were available, and the coaches were well-mannered and used good techniques. Many fests and sports events were organized. A gym was available on campus. Full Wi-Fi access was provided. The canteen food was good, and the hostels were cleaned every Sunday by workers. Bathrooms were also cleaned regularly. Cleanliness was good, and hygienic food was available. Shops for daily needs were available too. Our labs were good, and the professors and lab technicians were kind and explained everything in an easy manner. The department provided all facilities for students to learn every tool and technique.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Applied Psychology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college infrastructure is very good.

review_content.Placements: Our batch mates are very good, and one reason for this is that they are psychology students and they understood each other's behavior, due to which we got a lot of support.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building is very good. Labs are also well built, but the necessary equipment is very less in them. Similarly, the condition of the hostel and canteen is not very good. There are also medical facilities, etc. In case of emergency, the patient is also taken outside for treatment.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good, and the syllabus is completed on time. Classes are also run well. The result is quite good. Classes are conducted properly, and the pass percentage is quite high. Faculty members are very supportive and also organises extra classes during exams if required. Faculty members of our department are very good. Our department teachers also support us a lot, and we share any kind of problem with them without any hesitation.

overview_faqs.question: Is The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University good for MCA?
overview_faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University offers an MCA program at an affordable total tuition cost of INR 12,500, with an average package of INR 2.8L. There are 25 spots available and applicants must submit their CUET-PG results. Eligibility requires a B.C.A., B.Sc. or B.A. degree in mathematics (or mathematics as a 10+2 subject) from an accredited Indian or international university with a minimum cumulative GPA of 50% for General and OBC categories and 45% for SC/ST/PWD categories. Overall it presents a cost-effective option with promising career prospects.

overview_faqs.question: Is The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The MBA program at IGNTU is a two-year course, divided into four semesters. The university has good infrastructure and provides excellent placement with nearly 100% of students getting job offers. The highest internship package was 26000 and I was the one to grab it. The college has tie-up with companies like IRCTC, Flipkart, Odissa Tourism and several other big companies.The total fees for the MBA program at IGNTU is ?10,500. The university charges very minimum fees for students, and for SC and ST students, hostel fees are free.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for MBA in Business Administration at Indira Gandhi National Tribal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Fees for first semester for MBA in Business Administration at Indira Gandhi National Tribal University is INR 3150 and for subsequent semesters is INR 2450. So anually tution fees would be almost 6k and icluding all other expense it will touch approximately 10k.

overview_faqs.question: Does The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: If admission is cancelled before the last date, a 100% refund is provided (excluding the non-refundable registration fee). If canceled within 15 days post the admission session's closing, INR 500 will be deducted. Life at this campus is very good. The campus is covered in greenery, and the surroundings are the mountains of the Maikal Hills range. Excellent condition and good infrastructure at the hostelAccording to the UGC fee refund policy, a student is entitled to a refund of their fee if they withdraw from a course before the commencement of classes. If a student withdraws from a course after the commencement of classes, the amount of the refund will depend on the stage at which they withdraw.19

review_summary.college_name: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: M.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication.

content.Placements: The chances for exploring various fields such as a journalist, content creator, editor, and digital promoter. They create opportunities in various networks such as Times group, Zee network, Hindustan Times, and offer various intern experiences with a good stipend. This will allow us to take further job promotions.
content.Faculty: Teachers are talented in making the syllabus more compact and easier. Helps the students by providing relatable ideas, captured from real-time experiences in the field of study. Teachers support the intern work experiences by sharing positive and encouraging feedback.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Dec 2023)- Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and sports facilities. It has the best faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement is offered by the college but only 2-3 students get selected. Only 5% to 6% of students get selected. Highest package is 10 LPA, and lowest is 1 LPA - 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and Wipro. Mostly students got internships in local companies. Some will get internships from Google, NDTV, and Adobe.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is excellent. Facilities are top-notch from top universities with great knowledge and supportive in nature. Available features are library, Wi-Fi, and labs with latest technology. Quality of food is average but not so good. Medical and sports facilities are good and well-maintained. There is a separate sports complex for gym, games, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Zoology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I was satisfied with the placement facility in 2024 and the good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed, with an average package offered between 4-8 LPA. Students got internships in different colleges and research institutes.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available throughout the university, including classrooms, labs, library, hostel, and everywhere on campus (24/7). Facilities were quite good in the hostel, and the food quality was good in both the mess and canteen. Different types of sports were available, and the coaches were well-mannered and used good techniques. Many fests and sports events were organized. A gym was available on campus. Full Wi-Fi access was provided. The canteen food was good, and the hostels were cleaned every Sunday by workers. Bathrooms were also cleaned regularly. Cleanliness was good, and hygienic food was available. Shops for daily needs were available too. Our labs were good, and the professors and lab technicians were kind and explained everything in an easy manner. The department provided all facilities for students to learn every tool and technique.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Applied Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: Our batch mates are very good, and one reason for this is that they are psychology students and they understood each other's behavior, due to which we got a lot of support.
content.Infrastructure: The building is very good. Labs are also well built, but the necessary equipment is very less in them. Similarly, the condition of the hostel and canteen is not very good. There are also medical facilities, etc. In case of emergency, the patient is also taken outside for treatment.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good, and the syllabus is completed on time. Classes are also run well. The result is quite good. Classes are conducted properly, and the pass percentage is quite high. Faculty members are very supportive and also organises extra classes during exams if required. Faculty members of our department are very good. Our department teachers also support us a lot, and we share any kind of problem with them without any hesitation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is really good.

content.Placements: Companies don't come for recruitment in my college, so you have to try on yourself. After completing this course, most students can go into the research sector and pursue a Ph.D., or they can join any biotech industry in India or abroad. There are so many scope in foreign-related to the biotech field.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Labs are well-facilitated with equipment, and the library is also present on campus. Hostels are available for both girls and boys, with good facilities for accommodation.. The food quality in the mess is average. For sports and extracurricular activities, a sports complex is also present on campus. Only a few canteens are present on campus.

admission_overview.college_name: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Admission 2025: CUET, Process, Eligibility & Dates

admission_process.title: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University admissionis completely entrance-based. The university offers BSc, BPharma, MA, BA, MCA and other courses at UG and PG, doctoral and certificate levels in the fields of Science, Arts, Pharmacy and others. Admission to the UG courses is based on a valid score in the CUET-UG exam, followed by a counselling round. Additionally, for admission to PG courses,Indira Gandhi National Tribal Universityaccepts CUET-PG scores. Further, for some UG, diploma and certificate courses university offers admission based on last-qualifying exam scores. Read to know more about Indira Gandhi National Tribal University admission along with course-wise eligibility, selection, fees, seat intake and admission process 2025:

Indira Gandhi National Tribal University courseadmissions are entrance-based for all courses. However, for some UG, certificate and diploma courses, admission is merit-based. Students are required to go through the national-level entrances and then appear for the institute-level selection rounds for final admission. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for a few of the topIndira Gandhi National Tribal University courses:

Indira Gandhi National Tribal University feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually.

Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. The availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee and average package for the top Indira Gandhi National Tribal University courses:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Indira Gandhi National Tribal University seat intakevaries course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for the top Indira Gandhi National Tribal University courses:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Indira Gandhi National Tribal University accepts admission through national-level entrance exams, such as CUET, and CUET-PG, Candidates who meet the eligibility and selection criteria established by the university can apply by filling out the application form through the Indira Gandhi National Tribal University official website. Given below is the Indira Gandhi National Tribal University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

For admission to any of the programmes at the Indira Gandhi National Tribal University, candidates are required to fill out the application form through the university’s official website by paying the required application fee for final submission.
Step 2: Selection Criteria 2025

Indira Gandhi National Tribal University admission is completely entrance exam-based. The university inducts candidates through various national-level entrance exams, such as CUET-UG and CUET-PG, for different programmes. Candidates having valid scores in the aforementioned exams will be shortlisted for the counselling process.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment 2025

After the completion of the counselling process, candidates will be required to complete the final admission process, i.e. document verification and Indira Gandhi National Tribal University fee payment for final seat allotment.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who have passed 10+2 in any subject from a recognised Board/Institution having scored a minimum of 45% in aggregate or equivalent CGPA or equivalent grade in case of candidates belonging to the General category, EWS and OBC and 40% in case of students belonging to SC/ST/PWD categories are eligible to apply. But you have scored good marks in the Cuet entrance exam to grab a seat in this university. The 10+2 marks are only to meet the eligibility criteria but your CUET score is matter to get set in this university

faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University 2023?
faqs.answer: For undergraduate courses, students must have completed 10+2 with 45% aggregate marks and then they are eligible for cuet UG entrance exam U G course admission is done based on CUET UGFor the postgraduate courses, students must have compiled it degree with 50 % marks and the theory is eligible for the CUET PG exam PG course admission is done based on the CUET PG

faqs.question: Does IGNTU accept CUET score?
faqs.answer: IGNTU offers courses at the UG, PG, and Doctoral levels in full-time mode. Courses such as MBA, MA, and MSc are considered as some of the most popular programmes. Furthermore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation to clear the merit based eligibility. In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in CUET UG and CUET PG, considering the eligibility criteria of the chosen course.

placement_report.college_name: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: nbsp;As per the NIRF report 2024 released by Indira Gandhi National Tribal University, the median package offered during UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.6 LPA and INR 2.4 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at I NR 3 LPA .

Earlier, as per the NIRF report 2023, 36 MBA, 14 BPharma and 4 MPharma students were placed during IGNTU placements 2022. The median package offered to MBA students stood at INR 86,000 LPA. For BPharma and MPharma students, the median package offered during IGNTU placements 2022 was INR 2 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University?
faqs.answer: This university doesn't provide any placement services for students. Placement opportunities are only available for 1 branch. There are no placements for professional courses. Only around 20% of the students are placed. Salary packages offered were not the best, and not even internship opportunities were provided to the students. All the students search for jobs and internships on their own. A total of 21 out of 67 MBA students were placed during placements in 2021. However, 18 students were placed in 2020. The student must have passed a Graduate degree in the respective field with a minimum percentage of 50% to be admitted to the MBA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are three hostels in the Campus. Two boy’s hostels named as Govind Guru Boys hostel and Sone hostel and one girl's hostel named as Rani Durgawati Girls hostel. The students are provided with basic amenities like a cot, table, chair, cupboard in their rooms. Hostel’s common rooms have LED TV. There is adequate water supply as well as Solar geysers systems installed in the hostels towards conservation of nature and save electricity through the conventional source. There is a common computer room for the inmates. The whole campus including hostel is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a gym hall equipped with various machines in both boys and girls hostel. There is a separate open gym for girls. The hostel campus maintenance like cleaning/sweeping is outsourced. The security services are round the clock.

library.description: The University library has the collection of books over 57,427 including 1309 donated books, and Online e-resources subscribed through INFLIBNET e-ShodhSindh. The library has a special scheme called ‘Earn-While-Learn’ to help needy students earn some money during their free time. It ensures fair access to knowledge to the academics on the campus in particular and to each individual related to the university in general.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Hockey Ground, Kabaddi Ground

Hostels are available for both girls and boys, with good facilities for accommodation.. The food quality in the mess is average. For sports and extracurricular activities, a sports complex is also present on campus. Only a few canteens are present on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My masterpiece university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very excellent and modern, with good condition. There is a separate building for each facility, like Social Science having a separate building, etc. You can use the Wi-Fi facility in whole over the university. The mess facility is average, not good. The college provides facilities like a canteen, medical facilities, and sports indoor, outdoor, and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities regarding the courses.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like classrooms, computer labs, a library, Wi-Fi, and a mess are there. Hostel facilities are a little poor. I am not satisfied with facilities provided in the hostel. There is a gym, sports complex, medical dispensary, park, canteens, and shops on the campus for students.

reviews.review_heading: A original review of Indira Gandhi National Tribal University.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper classrooms and no proper Wi-Fi. However, there is a proper library. Wi-Fi is available on campus with a speed of 2 Mbps. There is no proper hostel management. The food quality is worst. There is a small dispensary, where students will never get any medicine. There is sports complex but there students have to be kids of staff members to get kits.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placements and the infrastructure of hostel and mess is poor.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were good, and the labs were also good, but not everything that students needed was provided. The library was good, and Wi-Fi was available. Hostel facilities were very poor, and the quality of food was also very poor. Because of this, many students were not well. There were no sports materials like bats, balls, or anything, and the ground was not clean.

reviews.review_heading: IGNTU: My story and life at University.
reviews.review_text: The university offers all kinds of facilities such as a hostel with only rupees 3250/- fees for OBC and General category students for one year. The library is available. Mess facilities are available but with monthly fees of rupees 3000/-. Sports complex, Gym, swimming pool, badminton hall, basketball, volleyball, and cricket ground are available.

reviews.review_heading: University far from main town.
reviews.review_text: In my department, there are no labs, Wi-Fi, and library facilities. Only one smart class for the whole department. There is no placement in my department. Classrooms are ok, not so good. Hostel facilities are very bad, no quality food for students and no study room, no library. There are only rooms in which students live, for other facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: It has a pollution-free environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It is located in a hill area far from the main town, and it is free from the polluted environment. All the departmental buildings are designed in a very systematic way and it looks very classy. There are labs for each department, especially for the pharmacy department, etc. There is a free Wi-Fi on the campus. There is a central library located in the heart of the university's main campus which opens at 6 AM in the morning and closes at 6.30 PM in the evening. Student...

reviews.review_heading: An experience of studying at IGNTU, Amarkantak.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility at this university is above average, and each hostel has Wi-Fi, reading rooms, a gym, and a dining hall. However, getting admission to the hostel is not easy. Students are selected on the basis of distance from the university, and not everyone is guaranteed a place in the hostel. The food in the hostel is average and vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Only environment related course is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but obtaining the username and password is a time-consuming process. Labs are average—neither too good nor bad. The number of classrooms is insufficient for each department. The library is well-equipped. The hostel lacks proper facilities; the caretaker is responsible but arrogant. The food is subpar, though the mess is hygienic. Medical staff and emergency facilities are always available when needed.

reviews.review_heading: I don’t recommend admission here—no placements and poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
There is a general store, photocopy shop, dispensary, and ambulance available at the university, but I would rate them 1 out of 5. The WiFi service is below average, rating a 2 out of 5, and the labs are not much better, also deserving a 2 out of 5. The classrooms are quite poor, earning just 1 out of 5, while the library is slightly better with a 3 out of 5 rating.

paragraphs: Fees for first semester for MBA in Business Administration at Indira Gandhi National Tribal University is INR 3150 and for subsequent semesters is INR 2450. So anually tution fees would be almost 6k and icluding all other expense it will touch approximately 10k.

If admission is cancelled before the last date, a 100% refund is provided (excluding the non-refundable registration fee). If canceled within 15 days post the admission session's closing, INR 500 will be deducted.
Life at this campus is very good. The campus is covered in greenery, and the surroundings are the mountains of the Maikal Hills range. Excellent condition and good infrastructure at the hostel

According to the UGC fee refund policy, a student is entitled to a refund of their fee if they withdraw from a course before the commencement of classes. If a student withdraws from a course after the commencement of classes, the amount of the refund will depend on the stage at which they withdraw.19

The total tuition fee for the MBA programme at The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University is Rs 10,500 only and this fee is very nominal as compared to other institutes as ROI is much better. Students who want to pursue this 2-year PG degree must have passed a Graduate degree in the respective field with a minimum percentage of 50% to be admitted to the MBA. It takes admissions based on various entrance exams such as CUET PG and MCA and many more.

Overview MBA in Business Administration at Indira Gandhi National Tribal University is a 2 years course at the PG level. The course offers admission to 38 students. The total tuition fee for Indira Gandhi National Tribal University MBA in Business Administration is INR 12,600. If you want to get more information please check college review in our website.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good for the unregular students.

review_content.Placements: Mass recruiters are Capgemini, Accenture, and Infosys. They offer a package that ranges from 3-5 LPA. It is an average college and not good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and classrooms are good. Some classrooms are equipped. Students have access to comfortable hostel accommodation which offers sanitary facilities. It has less infrastructure and few technical facilities. Labs are old, and they are not upgraded. The college has two buildings, an academic block with classrooms, labs, and faculty rooms. The hostel is medium. The canteen is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good education with experienced faculty, but bad placement.

review_content.Placements: Only 20% of students get placed in this college. The highest package is 5 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiters for this course are EY, Wipro, etc. Very few students get internships in this college. The roles offered to students are employees of the company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not that good. Labs are not the best, they are not modernized. Classrooms are good, and they have AC. The library is big, but not all books are available in the library related to my course. The quality and taste of the food is good. There are lots of sports available, like badminton, cricket, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for placement and also for environment.

content.Placements: College provides 50% placements. 3 LPA is salary package offered. HDFC and Mahindra are the recruiters. Every student got a paid internship at a high-ranking company. Human resources make your future secure, proving that they make a good impact in every field, so you can find a job easily and have a bright future. Come and see.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in the college. Everything is good in the mess hostel, they cook delicious food, take care of the hostel, and keep it clean for the students. Games are also available in college for your curricular activities, you can come.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good college with a nice infrastructure. The teaching staff is well-trained.

content.Placements: In my batch, there were around 80 students. Around 60% of students got placements in the final semester. The highest package was around 3 LPA, whereas the average package was 1.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Manith Healthcare and Maharana Pratap Group. Around 50% of students got internships in various companies such as Micromax Pharma and Elite Life Sciences. The major roles offered in the course were those of a medical representative, an assistant pharmacist, and a product team manager.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were well-furnished and ventilated. Labs were equipped with every instrument and device. The hostel rooms had adequate space, and the mess and canteen served decent quality food. The sports team of Maharishi University was good in several sports, such as cricket, and a big ground was available for the students to play.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for the unregular students.

content.Placements: Mass recruiters are Capgemini, Accenture, and Infosys. They offer a package that ranges from 3-5 LPA. It is an average college and not good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and classrooms are good. Some classrooms are equipped. Students have access to comfortable hostel accommodation which offers sanitary facilities. It has less infrastructure and few technical facilities. Labs are old, and they are not upgraded. The college has two buildings, an academic block with classrooms, labs, and faculty rooms. The hostel is medium. The canteen is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good education with experienced faculty, but bad placement.

content.Placements: Only 20% of students get placed in this college. The highest package is 5 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiters for this course are EY, Wipro, etc. Very few students get internships in this college. The roles offered to students are employees of the company.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not that good. Labs are not the best, they are not modernized. Classrooms are good, and they have AC. The library is big, but not all books are available in the library related to my course. The quality and taste of the food is good. There are lots of sports available, like badminton, cricket, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Maharishi University College.

content.Placements: The placement at this college was not very good. The highest package offered in this course was about 3.5 LPA, and the lowest package was about 1.5 LPA. Not all students got internships at this college. Only 20% were placed.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, libraries, and labs were good, and Wi-Fi was also available in these areas, but they did not share the password with students. The hostel facilities were good, and the food in the mess was not that great, but the canteen food was quite tasty. Several sports games were available for both boys and girls.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Lucknow Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_process.title: MUIT Lucknow Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maharishi University of Information Technology admission 2025is open. The university offers courses such as BBA, BSc, BCom, MA, MBA and more at the UG and PG levels. The university also offers diploma courses besides the UG and PG courses. Those seeking admission atMUIT Lucknowneed to clear the MUIT Entrance Exam conducted by the university. Alternatively, those with a valid score in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main/ CLAT/ CUET will be given direct admission if they fulfil the specified eligibility. At the Maharishi University of Information Technology Lucknow, students can choose to pursue courses in various streams such asPharmacy,Science,Managementetc.

Maharishi University of Information Technology, Lucknow offers admissions to its undergraduate courses based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. It also accepts valid scores obtained in national-level entrance exams for admissions to its programmes. All of the courses offered at MUIT Lucknow are in regular mode. Find below the key highlights forMaharishi University of Information Technology admissions 2025:
MUIT Lucknow Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
22 (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
UG courses: INR 31,500 - INR 4 lakh
PG courses: INR 63,000 - INR 1.4 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma
Popular programmes
BA| BSc| BTech| MA| MTech

Students are accepted into the UG, PG and Diploma programmes offered at MUIT Lucknow on an entrance basis. The university offers a variety of specialisations for its courses. Students need to appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university MUIT-ET. The table below carries the eligibility and selection details for thecourses offered at Maharishi University of Information Technology, Lucknow:

Maharishi University of Information Technology, Lucknow total tuition fee varies according to the programme selected by the students. The candidates must pay the programme fee in order to confirm admission. Find below the details for theMUIT Lucknow fee:

Maharishi University of Information Technology Lucknow admissionsare offered based on both entrance and merit secured by applicants in their most recent qualifying exam. To be eligible for a seat, candidates must complete all of the course's selection rounds. The eligible candidates can refer to the below-mentioned steps for theadmission process of MUIT Lucknow:

Step 1: MUIT Lucknow Application Process:Visit the official website of MUIT Lucknow and register yourself. Fill out the application process, select the desired programme, generate System ID and proceed with the payment of the application fee to successfully submit the application form.
Step 2: MUIT Lucknow Selection Process

Those who meet the specified eligibility criteria set by the university for the programmes, will be contacted by the counsellors of MUIT who will direct the students through the remaining admission process and provide details regarding theMUIT Entrance Exam. Those who clear the entrance exam will be contacted via mail by the MUIT counsellors. Direct admission will be offered based on your JEE score/ CUET score if the university deems fit.
Step 3: Fee Payment and Admission ConfirmationThe shortlisted candidates will be accepted into the programme once they have paid the course fee and submitted the specified documents.

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission in Maharishi University of Information Technology, Lucknow must fulfill the specified eligibility before applying for the desired programme. Those who meet the eligibility criteria can follow the below-mentioned steps to take admission in MUIT Lucknow:Step 1: Ensure that you meet the specified eligibility as stated by the university.Step 2: Visit the official website of Maharishi University of Information Technology and register yourself to generate a System ID.Step 3: Upon completion of the application process, the candidates will be contacted by the MUIT counsellors to schedule the MUIT entrance exam.Step 4: Appear for the MUIT entrance exam and secure a valid score.Step 5: The shortlisted candidates will be sent Admission Letter via email. Confirm your admission by paying the programme fee.

faqs.question: Is admission to Maharishi University of Information Technology open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Maharishi University of Information Technology admissions are currently ongoing. Interested candidates can visit the official website of the university and apply for the desired programme online. The university offers admissions on the basis of marks secured in entrance test conducted by the university. For further details, candidates are advised to contact the admissions cell of the university by phone or email.

hostel_campus.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Lucknow Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for placement and also for environment.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in the college. Everything is good in the mess hostel, they cook delicious food, take care of the hostel, and keep it clean for the students. Games are also available in college for your curricular activities, you can come.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college with a nice infrastructure. The teaching staff is well-trained.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were well-furnished and ventilated. Labs were equipped with every instrument and device. The hostel rooms had adequate space, and the mess and canteen served decent quality food. The sports team of Maharishi University was good in several sports, such as cricket, and a big ground was available for the students to play.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for the unregular students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and classrooms are good. Some classrooms are equipped. Students have access to comfortable hostel accommodation which offers sanitary facilities. It has less infrastructure and few technical facilities. Labs are old, and they are not upgraded. The college has two buildings, an academic block with classrooms, labs, and faculty rooms. The hostel is medium. The canteen is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good education with experienced faculty, but bad placement.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not that good. Labs are not the best, they are not modernized. Classrooms are good, and they have AC. The library is big, but not all books are available in the library related to my course. The quality and taste of the food is good. There are lots of sports available, like badminton, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharishi University College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, libraries, and labs were good, and Wi-Fi was also available in these areas, but they did not share the password with students. The hostel facilities were good, and the food in the mess was not that great, but the canteen food was quite tasty. Several sports games were available for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Journey of life to find our strength and weakness.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for performing practicals. We have 2 libraries. One is a central library and another is a humanity library. The central library is large. The college provides computer labs. We can issue books with the help of the library card. It is valid for 1 week. Wi-Fi is also available but everyone doesn't have their access.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college compared to other colleges nearby. It has value for money.
reviews.review_text: In my department, we have got good enough facilities in classrooms and canteen area. Hotel facilities are not good. In the canteen, there are far better services. Sports, games, and events are conducted. The mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college, faculty, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the college are outstanding such as a laboratory, a library, and a playground for students to play and relax. Classrooms and washrooms are well-maintained keeping an eye on hygiene and cleanliness. Not only the university, but the hostel area is also well-maintained and clean. The food provided is also well-cooked in the mess with proper hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharishi University of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. They opt for renewable sources of energy, as they installed solar panels on the roof of college. Classrooms are good, but the seating can be improved, as it is slightly comfortable to sit on a chair. Overall, infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: An average college, and it is the last option to choose.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, both the hostel and college are quite good. There is a happy and ragging-free campus with almost all amenities. The library is available for self-study. The food quality at the mess is not up to the mark, but it is manageable. Overall, our college has good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It is a bad college of Lucknow .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and information available for my course are too bad and there is no support for Wi-Fi. The labs are fully equipped, the classroom is not clean, and the library was built after my batch. There are no books available in the library and the quality of food available in the canteen is too bad.

reviews.review_heading: Private university (MUIT Lucknow)
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good for students. There is a different hostel for girls and boys. As per your comfort and choice, you can choose either a three-seater or two-seater room. Rooms are well-furnished, and security is also good. Mess food is fine. If we talk about college infrastructure, it's very large and beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: MAHARISHI UNIVERSITY OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY, LUCKNOW
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really eye catching. It have well furnished classrooms. There is auditorium, hall, labs, libraries and canteen in the college. Hostel is provided to the students who is not native to this place or they have a need of it . It's also good and the food is also average.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
There is a digital classroom with air conditioning. 
Wi-Fi is available at the college. 
Labs are systematically available with proper chemicals and equipment. 
The quality of food in the hostel is good; the canteen is there in the college; medical facilities are there; sports and games are also there .

reviews.review_heading: An average college for the CSE course.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available for our course at this college was good. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, halls, auditorium, projectors, etc., were available for the students. The library and labs of the college were well-stocked with the necessary equipment and books. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

The application fee of MUIT Lucknow is non-refundable.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology are BTech and MTech. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum.
BTech and MTech students are trained with modern and advanced technology. Sardar Vallabhbhai University Meerut courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at the Agricultural University Meerut, in the table provided below:

placements.overview: The university has not released the placement report for the year 2023. A total of 25 out of 257 UG and PG students were placed during placements 2022 as per NIRF. The median package offered to UG and PG students were INR 3 LPA and INR 8.33 LPA during SVPUAT placements 2022.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology does offer internship opportunities to final year students. The porpose of an internship is to give the students the experience in the career field they want to pursue. Not only does this give individuals an edge over other candidates when applying for jobs, but it also prepares them for what to expect in their field and increases confidence in their work.
faqs.question: Does Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology offer internship opportunities to students?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University Meerut offers UG and PG levels programmes to students. The university is mainly concerned with the Engineering and Science streams. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, and BVSc programmes to students. At the PG level, the university offers courses such as MTech, MSc, and MVSc programmes to students.

faqs.answer: A:    ICAR AIEEA is required to get admission in Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology. However, candidates can also get admission without ICAR AIEEA score if they qualify UPCATET. The UP Combined Agriculture and Technology Entrance Test  (UPCATET) is a combined-level entrance exam held to offer admission for different UG and PG programmes. It is an offline exam conducted once in a year.
faqs.question: Can I get into Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology without ICAR AIEEA?

faqs.answer: A:    Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Besides qualifying the entrance exam, candidates must also fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. Below is the eligibility criteria for top SVBP University courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBSc (Hons)Intermediate in Agriculture Science/ Physics, Chemistry and Biology/ PCM/ PCMBMScBSc in relevant subjectsBTechIntermediate in Agriculture Science/ Physics, Chemistry and Biology/ PCM/ PCMBBVScIntermediate in PCB/ PCMB with English as a subject with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for OBC/ SC/ ST)MTechBachelor's degree in relevant subjects
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    UPCATET is a state level exam conducted by Sardar Vallabh Bhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology. The counseling for the UG courses in SVPUAT will be conducted by UPCATET especially in Agriculture, Economics & Mgmt.Eligibility: For admission to the B.Tech. (Biotechnology), the candidate must have completed 10+2 level in PCB/ PCMB with English as a subject along with 50% aggregate.
faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required to get a seat at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee is required to be paid after filling the form. otherwise the form will not be accepted by the authorities. This year updated fees will be mentioned in UPCATET 2026 notification but according to previous year details, male candidates from General & OBC category have to pay INR 1350 while all other male & female candidates have to pay INR 1100 application fees. The application fees need to be paid online via Debit card, Credit card, Net banking etc. Once the fee is paid students are required to download the receipt of fees as some time due to any error if their candidature is rejected then they can raise their concern along with payment proof.
faqs.question: What are the application fees to fill the UPCATET exam form?

review_content.General: All the classes are well-maintained with smart board and availability of Wi-Fi. There are good quality labs for practical knowledge. Central library is also present where all types of books, journals, magazines, research papers, and newspapers are present for all students. The availability of the hostel is also good. Good food is served in the mess. There is a canteen, juice corners, and stationery shops inside the university. There is a university hospital for immediate treatment of students. Sports and games ground is also present with a gym, badminton court and table tennis.

reviews_list.review_title: University life is the best life.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 44 spaces for students in our class. The highest package of our college is 5 LPA. Some of the students also got self-placements. The most important roles offered by our course are food officer, safety officer, day technology, and day engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our colleges gives an ancient look which mainly attracts most of the students. The campus is filled with greenery which creates a very friendly environment. The hostel is also very affordable and provides every important or required facility for a student.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Many students opt for higher education in the same field, and many students get industrial jobs in Amul, Parag, Nestled, etc. I do not know about the highest or average package, but it was good. 2 internships are provided to students in a span of 4 years, one in 2nd semester and another in the last semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite nice. It has all the essential items, equipment, machines, and tools needed for an efficient laboratory and campus. Facilities in the hostel are good too. Sports equipment is provided for badminton, chess, table tennis, carrom, etc. The cost is also minimal.

faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University Meerut has been recognised and funded by the UP Govt. & ICAR, Govt. of India. It has also been recognised by the UGC and approved by the AICTE. SVPUAT courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The university is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Science. Some of the popular courses offered at Sardar Patel University Meerut are BTech, BSc, BVSc, MTech, etc. The university has a panel of guest lecturers to inspire students in their respective careers and to give them tips and invaluable insights in every course. The university also offers an excellent infrastructure to students.
faqs.question: Q: Why choose Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University Meerut?

faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology is situated in Uttar Pradesh. It was established in 2002. It offers various courses like BTech, Mtech, M.Sc, M.V.Sc, B.Sc., B.V.Sc. The duration of these courses varies from 2-5 years depending upon the course like wise the fee also varies. B.E or B.Tech fees varies from 92 Lakh to 1.5 lakh pa. Bsc course fees is 69 k and BVSC course fees is upto 4 LPA. The eligibility to take admission in any of these courses are 10+2 with minimum 50 percent aggregate.
faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology?

faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology admissions begins in March with UPCATET registration. The applications for UPCATET closed by the end of May. Candidates need to appear for UPCATET to get admission in SVBP University. The exam is held in the month of June.
faqs.question: Q: When do admissions begin at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology?

faqs.answer: SVBP University offers various courses such as BVSC, B.Tech, B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Tech, MVSC. The courses offered by the college have different fees for the different courses. The Fees for an BVSC is INR 4 Lakhs. The fees for B.Tech is nearly 92K- 1.5L, the fees for B.Sc is nearly 69K . For, further details regarding the fee structure of the college students can visit the official website of the college and then click on the admission tab and check the fee structure by opening the fees tab of the college. Students can directly call on the numbers given on the official website for further details.
