overview_faqs.question: Why choose Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University Meerut?
overview_faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University Meerut has been recognised and funded by the UP Govt. & ICAR, Govt. of India. It has also been recognised by the UGC and approved by the AICTE. SVPUAT courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The university is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Science. Some of the popular courses offered at Sardar Patel University Meerut are BTech, BSc, BVSc, MTech, etc. The university has a panel of guest lecturers to inspire students in their respective careers and to give them tips and invaluable insights in every course. The university also offers an excellent infrastructure to students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at SVBP University?
overview_faqs.answer: SVBP University offers various courses such as BVSC, B.Tech, B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Tech, MVSC. The courses offered by the college have different fees for the different courses. The Fees for an BVSC is INR 4 Lakhs. The fees for B.Tech is nearly 92K- 1.5L, the fees for B.Sc is nearly 69K . The fee for M.Sc is nearly 56K- 1.8L. For, further details regarding the fee structure of the college students can visit the official website of the college and then click on the admission tab and check the fee structure by opening the fees tab of the college. Students can directly call on the numbers given on the official website for further details.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at SVBP University?
overview_faqs.answer: SVBP University offers various courses such as BVSC, B.Tech, B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Tech, MVSC. The courses offered by the college have different fees for the different courses. The Fees for an BVSC is INR 4 Lakhs. The fees for B.Tech is nearly 92K- 1.5L, the fees for B.Sc is nearly 69K . For, further details regarding the fee structure of the college students can visit the official website of the college and then click on the admission tab and check the fee structure by opening the fees tab of the college. Students can directly call on the numbers given on the official website for further details.

review_summary.college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University Meerut Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Sugarcane Science and Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with sports facilities.

content.Placements: Recently, the course of B.Tech. in Sugarcane Science and Technology has been started. A new batch is admitted. We can't tell exactly about placements as a fresher. About 50 students took admission in the past 2 years, and 2 batches are there. We are hoping for more admissions further.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are awesome. The hostel is kind of average. Facilities are provided, but not up to standard. A sports stadium is available. A hospital is there, but it is not of high standards. Sports facilities are disappointing as it does not provide equipment. The hospital is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, facilities, and friendly faculty members are provided in the college.

content.Placements: Admission to this university is based on the entrance exams like UPCATET and CUET ICAR. The cut-off is made on the marks of these exams. On the basis of marks, the course is allotted to the students according to their scores in the exam. There are no on-campus placements in B.Tech food technology till now but it is expected that in some years, there will be recruiters as now, it is accredited with NAAC A grade. The lowest package is 5 LPA and the highest package is 25 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: All the classes are well-maintained with smart board and availability of Wi-Fi. There are good quality labs for practical knowledge. Central library is also present where all types of books, journals, magazines, research papers, and newspapers are present for all students. The availability of the hostel is also good. Good food is served in the mess. There is a canteen, juice corners, and stationery shops inside the university. There is a university hospital for immediate treatment of students. Sports and games ground is also present with a gym, badminton court and table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: University life is the best life.

content.Placements: There are a total of 44 spaces for students in our class. The highest package of our college is 5 LPA. Some of the students also got self-placements. The most important roles offered by our course are food officer, safety officer, day technology, and day engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our colleges gives an ancient look which mainly attracts most of the students. The campus is filled with greenery which creates a very friendly environment. The hostel is also very affordable and provides every important or required facility for a student.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology.

content.Placements: Many students opt for higher education in the same field, and many students get industrial jobs in Amul, Parag, Nestled, etc. I do not know about the highest or average package, but it was good. 2 internships are provided to students in a span of 4 years, one in 2nd semester and another in the last semester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite nice. It has all the essential items, equipment, machines, and tools needed for an efficient laboratory and campus. Facilities in the hostel are good too. Sports equipment is provided for badminton, chess, table tennis, carrom, etc. The cost is also minimal.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: You can achieve more from this.

content.Placements: There were no placement cells in our college. None of the students got placed till then, not even in the last 4 years when I was there. No company visited during that time. However, one thing was that the internships were done very sincerely. It was the only thing that was in the hands of the students, whether they wanted to do it with their professor or off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was quite good, and the college looked very brilliant. The lighting also looked pretty at night. The center of attraction was our central library, which was very huge. The condition of our indoor stadium was not so good, but the machines in the gym were fine. The university stadium was also very huge.

admission_overview.college_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University Meerut Admission 2025: Applications, Eligibility, Process, Fees & Last Dates

admission_process.title: SVBP University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SVBP University admissionsare entrance-based. The university accepts UPCATET andICAR AIEEA for admission to UG and PG courses. The combined agriculture and technology entrance test (CATET) will be conducted by SVPUAT Meerut,CSAUAK Kanpur,NDUAT Faizabad, MSKRJUAT.SVBP Universityoffers 65 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels through seven colleges. The courses include BSc, BVSc, MTech, MSc, etc.

SVBP University offers UG, PG and PhD courses in full-time mode. Candidates can apply online for their preferred course or collect the form from the campus. Below are keySVBP University admissionhighlights:
Particulars
SVBP University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
UG courses:INR 69,000 - INR 4 lakh
PG courses:INR 56,000 - INR 1.8 lakh
How to apply?
https://www.svpuat.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology offers admission to UG and PG courses based on state or national-level entrance exam. Besides, candidates must also meet the course-specific eligibility to get admission. Below are popularSVBP University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Check out otherSVBP University Courses

SVBP University fee is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel charges, mess charges, etc. Fee components such as caution deposits are one-time payable. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

Reservation of seats for UG courses shall be governed as per the rules of State Government. The committee recommends 25% ICAR seats to be filled via ICAR Entrance Exam. Below are popular SVBP University courses along with their fee and intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SVBP University admission process includes multiple steps such as registration, selection and admission confirmation. Admission to all the courses is based on entrance exam score. Below are the steps to get a seat in SVBP University:
Step 1: SVBP University application process 2025
Candidates can apply online for UPCATET. Application forms for SVBP can be obtained from office of the registrar/concerned bank of the university after depositing the required amount.
STEP 2: Selection

The university selects candidates based on ICAR AIEEA and UPCATET for UG and PG courses. The UP Combined Agriculture and Technology Entrance Test(UPCATET)is a combined-level entrance exam held to offer admission for different UG and PG programmes. It is an offline exam conducted once in a year. Once the entrance-exam results are out, a merit list is released by the university.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates are called for counselling and document verification. Further, they need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

courses_data.name: SVBP University BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:UPCATET, JEE Main, ICAR AIEEA
courses_data.description: SVBP University offers four-year BTech in various specialisations such as Agriculture Engineering, Dairy Technology, Sugarcane Science and Technology,Biotechnologyand Food Technology. The course is spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 are eligible to apply for BTech programme.

faqs.question: Can I get into SVBP University BTech with 70% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: SVBP University has not specified the minimum aggregate to apply for BTech course. However, candidates must complete Class 12 to fill out the application form. A 70% aggregate in Class 12 is a decent score and candidates can apply for BTech course with that score. Besides, they also need to qualify ICAR AIEEA or UPACTET exam for admission to BTech programme.

faqs.question: What are the essential qualifications for admission to BTech course at SVBP University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed intermediate in Agriculture Science/ Physics, Chemistry and Biology/ PCM/ PCMB can apply for SVBP University BTech programme. Besides, candidates must also qualify ICAR AIEEA or UPCATET for BTech admission. Aspirants are advised to keep the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: When do admissions begin at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology?
faqs.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology admissions begins inMarchwith UPCATET registration. The applications for UPCATET closed by the end ofMay. Candidates need to appear for UPCATET to get admission in SVBP University. The exam is held in the month of June.

reviews.review_text: For BSc Ag students, the lab is good, and the university's library is one of the best in the west, with all facilities such as wifi, air conditioning, and all books related to your course. The classrooms are good; there are smart classrooms. The hostel rooms are average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college because of faculty, good placement and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university has good facilities and infrastructure. The classrooms and labs are well-equipped, and the wifi works well on campus. The library is newly inaugurated, and it has excellent facilities. The hostels have good food and comfortable rooms. The university organizes sports competitions every year, and students can participate in national-level competitions.

reviews.review_heading: The campus vibe is very good for teaching and research.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available throughout the hostel, labs, classrooms, library, and college campus. Labs and classrooms are in proper working condition, with smart boards and digital boards in the classrooms. Hostel facilities are excellent, and food options are available in every hostel. The university also has a hospital for the medical needs of students.

reviews.review_heading: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Agriculture University Meerut: Admission, Feels, Course.
reviews.review_text: There are a total of 13 hostels on campus: 8 for boys and 5 for girls. The courses offered include UG programs like B.Sc. in Agriculture and Horticulture, as well as B.Tech. in Dairy Technology, Food Technology, Sugercen Technology, Biotechnology, and Agriculture Technology. PG courses include M.Sc. in all Agriculture and Horticulture subjects, and M.Tech. in Food Processing and Farm Machinery.

reviews.review_heading: My life at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of agriculture and technology Meerut.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for BVSC and AH are that you get a smart classroom, a college library, and a central library that are fully A.C. with Wi-Fi available. The rooms are well developed with proper ventilation, and a bed is provided for each student. The mess quality is average, and the menu is simple, like no Chinese or South Indian dishes are prepared by the mess owner. If you want to rent a room or PG, then you have to search outside the campus. A friend of mine rented a...

reviews.review_heading: Pursuing BVSC and AH to become a respectable Doctor.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of the campus is surrounded by greenery, plants and trees. The classrooms are smart classes with Wi-Fi connection. The library is huge having Wi-Fi and AC available, it is cleaned regularly. The hostel has 2 seater rooms with the availability of a cupboard, a table and a chair for each student along with 24 hours of electricity and water availability. A canteen is situated in the center of the campus. There is a hospital for the students and faculty members. There is a big spo...

reviews.review_heading: Happily enjoying my college life at SVPUAT .
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, clean, have RO water, and the food quality is also satisfactory. Electricity availability is 24 hours a day. Gym facilities are available separately for boys and girls. There are a total 4 girls hostels. There are different hostels for UG and PG students, so it goes for boys, although they have more hostels .

reviews.review_heading: If you only want a degree, you are welcome at the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but with average resources. Like only one water resource or RO filter in the whole college for students, washrooms are also not in good condition, and the sitting benches and chairs are already broken and old. Smart class is only for the name; once a month we visit there.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in this university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best and most impressive with much greenery, especially in the horticulture research center and administrative section. The infrastructure of the central library is very good with an attractive fountain in front of the gate.

review_summary.college_name: Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SPMC Bikaner makes good medical practitioners.

content.Placements: Mostly students got placed. There was no limit on the package. All students become good medical practitioners. Many popular doctors graduated from this college. This college also taught humanity. Courses were MBBS, nursing, paramedical, DMLT, MD, MS, DM, and MCH. It also provided fellowship as junior residence MO.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good. Campus was big. Our college environment was good. Canteen was also good. Library facilities were available. Reading room was available. Mess quality was good. Sports events were organised. Department was non-toxic and quality of food was very good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Journey of Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner.

content.Placements: There are no placements in the medical colleges, like in engineering colleges, but there are rotatory clinical postings in various departments of the college and hospital after completing the course of 4-year MBBS. The stipend will be 21,000 per year and it increases by 10% every year.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very bad in both hostels and college. Hostel food is also very bad and getting worse day by day. There is no Wi-Fi or labs in college. The library is also quite old but offers both academic and non-academic book collections. Sports include badminton, swimming pool, tennis court and various indoor and outdoor sports.

cut_off.college_name: Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 6026 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner MBBS cutoff 2025 was 6026 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 6177 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 12296 to 55554. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Obstetrtics and Gynaecology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 12296.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.

NEET PG (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test for Post-Graduation), is conducted for admission to various PG courses courses across the country. In this section, students can view the important dates for NEET PG Cutoff 2025.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 105 and 4281, with DM being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner M.Ch. cutoff 2025 ranged between 848 and 3581 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 848, M.Ch. in Urology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider M.Ch. in Neuro Surgery with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

Candidates appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table given below to view or download the consolidated round-wise cutoff PDFs. The cutoff PDFs are available round-wise for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

The Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner released its Round 1 Cutoff list for candidates seeking admission to various courses. For the General HS category candidates, the most difficult course was MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery, with the closing rank of 4616.

reviews.review_heading: SPMC Bikaner makes good medical practitioners.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Campus was big. Our college environment was good. Canteen was also good. Library facilities were available. Reading room was available. Mess quality was good. Sports events were organised. Department was non-toxic and quality of food was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Journey of Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is very bad in both hostels and college.
Hostel food is also very bad and getting worse day by day.
There is no Wi-Fi or labs in college.
The library is also quite old but offers both academic and non-academic book collections.
Sports include badminton, swimming pool, tennis court and various indoor and outdoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Sardar patel medical College, bikaner review (since 1959)
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but not so good. Labs of all subjects are present in better conditions. Classroom is best with ac. Library is present with full ac and ro water 24 hour. All games are time to time played in our college. Games curriculum is best. Hostel of boys and girls are separate. Boys hostel are 4 in which more than 100 rooms in each, which means hostel are big.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner.
reviews.review_text: SPMC Bikaner College consists of separate boys and girls hostels. There are separate 4 blocks of boys hostel. There are separate indoor and outdoor sports activity complexes in the hostel. The food provided in the hostel mess is good and nutritional. The complex of the college and hostel is spread over a large area and provides a large area of sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Sardar patel medical college Bikaner .
reviews.review_text: Our college follows the NMC curriculum. This provides horizontal and vertical integration for students which help to study easily. Foundation classes also organized in initial days. Hostel facility is good. We can use any equipment in room. Mess food is also good. Food prepared is according to our choice.

reviews.review_heading: SPMC is a great option for medical enthusiasts to pursue MBBS.
reviews.review_text: With a decent infrastructure and good student-patient exposure, this college is a great option for medical enthusiasts. It has a huge campus with separate hostels for girls and boys, along with other facilities like a sports complex, library, etc. Hostels are provided with a mess, which offers good and hygienic food. We have discussion halls in our college where you can study and discuss topics with your friends, serving as a stress buster during exam times. The campus has its own canteen for a ...

reviews.review_heading: Overview of SPMC Bikaner .
reviews.review_text: There are a total of two buildings at our college: one is new, and the other is old. We have different lecture halls for different subjects, and the various departments are located in different areas. All the departments have their own laboratories where practicals are conducted by students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: Our college has two buildings. It provides us with all facilities. Many classes are held in the new building. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. More than 250 students can accommodate in each classroom. Our college has a library. We have reading rooms where hundreds of students come for self-study every day. Our campus provides separate labs for each department, including anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, microbiology, and pharmacology. All labs are equipped with the nece...

reviews.review_heading: It is no. 1 college in Rajasthan for NEET PG.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is average because college stabilise in 1959. So that buildings are old. Lab also persents and it has very good condition. Hostel are present and it is clean and food quality good. Sport activity are also persent and games like baliboll and football and other.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the personality development of students.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hospital are situated very close to each other to make it easy for the students to attend the college and reach their postings on time. Hospital provides great facilities for the students to learn the practical aspects of various cases and subjects. Classrooms are very spacious and enough for the great strength of aspiring doctors. There are various departments that have well maintained different laboratories with the required equipment to perform various experiments. Preserved s...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in Rajasthan, but its infrastructure is not good.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, it is not good. Only the infrastructure of the new girls' hostel is good as compared to other hostels and colleges. The old building is in bad condition, but the new building is fine. There are no Wi-Fi facilities. New lecture halls are good but lack proper air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college was built in 1957. Wi-Fi facility is available. It also provides an e-library. Laboratory is good but equipments are old. Our classrooms are well-furnished, and air-conditioners are available. The food served in the mess is good. There are 4 messes on campus. Sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sardar Patel Medical College, Bikaner.
reviews.review_text: We have well-maintained lecture theatres with well-established cooling and sound systems. All departments have well-equipped labs. We have well-maintained libraries and reading rooms. The hostel is well maintained. The quality of food available is good. There are no sports facilities, but the college sports ground is very near to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: We are well satisfied with our college because of its good infrastructure and hardworking faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and classrooms is good, but there is no air-conditioning or Wi-Fi facilities in our college. Some labs are newly built, so they are in fine condition, but some are in bad condition. The faculty members are outstanding and very hard-working. Our girls' hostel is newly built and has great infrastructure. The mess food is also good and well-nutritional. There are basketball courts, a football ground, badminton and tennis courts, and swimming pool facilities on our ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied enough with the course.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, but our hostel rooms are worth staying in. The food quality is good, and the mess is clean too. We are in a medical college, so we are provided with medical facilities. We have different clubs, such as sports, literature, cultural etc.
